memories.memory:
【Tokyo Interest】Session: Tokyo Interest. Session Date: October 19, 2023. 10:11 AM, Dave says Tokyo looks incredible; he found an online pic that makes him dream about visiting someday, and the energy there seems unbeatable; he asks Calvin if he has ever visited streets like that. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a busy street with people walking and shopping. Calvin replies that yes, that was an incredible experience to visit similar streets like the photo; asks if there is anything else that interests you in Tokyo? 10:11 AM, Dave adds that Tokyo is amazing; he wants to know everything about it—the people, the culture, the food, and the vibrant city life; in the photo below, the city is so alive and colorful that's impressive; it will be an unforgettable experience. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a crowded street at night with people walking and walking. Calvin responds that that photo's a great pic; the lights, the people—so lively; can't wait to hear your emotions when you see that in person. 10:11 AM, Dave concludes that it's really amazing and hopes to see it in person soon. 【Calvin's Tokyo Plan】Session Date: October 19, 2023

At 10:11 AM, Calvin said he is going to Tokyo next month after the tour ends and wishes to revisit places like the photo below, describing the view as great — a city at night with a tall building in the background (image). He stated Shibuya Crossing is Tokyo's Times Square and that he is excited to explore Shinjuku, noting there is amazing food there and he can't wait to try it again, and he shared a photo of Shibuya Crossing at night. Dave replied that Shibuya and Shinjuku are cool spots, Tokyo's food is great, and he will have so much fun exploring all the different places; he asked if Calvin had tried ramen yet and shared a photo of a ramen bowl he tried in Boston, saying it was delicious, but in Tokyo it will be even better (image). Calvin said he has never tried ramen, but it's supposed to be awesome and he will give it a shot in Tokyo. Dave urged, "Do it, Calvin! Once you try it, you'll never go back." Calvin replied that he will definitely give it a shot and appreciates the encouragement.

【Japan Trip & Culture】March 23, 2023, 11:53 AM: Calvin expresses excitement about learning Japanese culture and expanding. Dave asks if Calvin has been to Japan. Calvin replies that he has never been there before and is fascinated by the traditions. Dave asks when he is leaving. Calvin says he is heading there next month and will be staying in a nice place; Calvin shares an image: a photo of a living room with a couch, table, and television. Dave comments that it looks cozy and asks where he found a place. Calvin replies that his agent found an awesome place. Dave notes that having a place to stay is key. They discuss plans: Calvin intends to explore the city, try different local cuisines, and perhaps collaborate with musicians in the area. Dave says collaborating with local musicians would be an amazing experience and asks how long he plans to stay. Calvin responds: a few months, then off to Boston. 【Park Visit】On March 23, 2023 at 11:53 AM, Dave said he has been spending lots of time at a beautiful park lately, finding it calming, and asked Calvin if he has been there before; he shared an image—a photograph of a park with a lake and a few boats. Calvin replied that he has never been to that park, described it as a chill spot, said he will definitely check it out when he's back, and appreciated the tip. Dave added that Calvin should let him know if he needs any more recommendations. Calvin responded that if he needs any help, he'll be sure to let Dave know.

【Tokyo Performance】May 16, 2023, 11:50 AM: Calvin expressed excitement for his upcoming performance in Tokyo this month, stating it will be great to share his music with a whole new crowd and hopefully expand his following. May 16, 2023, 11:50 AM: Dave acknowledged the Tokyo show, said the audience will probably love it, and wished Calvin luck, asking to be informed of the outcome. May 16, 2023, 11:50 AM: Calvin replied that he would keep Dave posted, thanked him for the good luck, and shared an image of a city at night with many lights. 【Tokyo Skyline and Visit】Session Date: May 16, 2023. On May 16, 2023, at 11:50 AM, Dave asked where the photo was snapped; Calvin replied that the photo was taken in Tokyo last night and the skyline was stunning; Dave complimented the shot, noting the night skyline really pops with city lights, and stated an intention to visit Tokyo soon; Calvin observed that the city lights there are amazing and encouraged Dave to visit; Dave said he is definitely adding Tokyo to his list.

【Tokyo Show Experience】Session Date: August 14, 2023. On August 14, 2023, at 12:35 AM, Calvin described touring with a well-known artist and performing to connect with the audience; the tour ended with a show in Japan, after which he explored his new place, calling it a dream come true. Dave asked how Tokyo reacted to his music and whether there were any special moments. Calvin reported that the Tokyo show was awesome; everyone was into it when he played one of his songs and sang along, a magical moment. He said such moments make him proud and motivated, and that he is about spreading joy with his art. He noted the buzz of the moment and asked how Dave's project was going, offering encouragement: You've got this; I'm always here for you; seeing your enthusiasm is amazing; keep growing, it'll be worth it. 【Tokyo Show Photos】[Tokyo Show Photos]
[Session Date: August 14, 2023]

On August 14, 2023, at 12:35 AM, Dave asked Calvin for pictures from that show. Calvin replied, "Yeah, here's a pic I took. It was so awesome - I loved how the crowd was into it. These moments are why I love my job." Image shared by Calvin: a photography of a crowd of people at a concert with their hands up. Dave commented, "The energy in that pic is awesome! Seeing everyone with their hands up must have been really cool. It's great when your passion brings joy to others!"

【Tokyo Festival】April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Calvin attended a music festival in Tokyo; the festival was awesome; he did not see any bands but met many talented artists and industry people, finding it enriching. He learned a lot and received advice from professionals in the music industry, and it was inspiring. The producer advised him to stay true to himself and sound unique, which made him think about where he wants his music to go and was motivating. Dave asked what he learned and whether he got any advice, and then asked where he sees his music taking him. 【Boston Trip】April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Calvin states that he dreams of touring the world, performing for different people and connecting with them; he hopes his music reaches a global audience and makes an impact, and he is looking forward to his upcoming trip to Boston after finishing the Frank Ocean tour, having heard that the Boston music scene is awesome and wanting to check it out. April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Dave says the plan is amazing, he will show Calvin around town and all the cool spots; the Boston music scene is awesome, with places like Paradise Rock, House of Blues, and Fenway Park, and Calvin will definitely have some great performances there; he offers to be in the front row when Calvin is onstage; he shares an image described as a city skyline with a boat in the water. April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Calvin states that Boston looks great and the tips were helpful, and notes the image of a city skyline with a boat.

【Japan Mountain View】June 21, 2023, 03:15 PM: Calvin: excited to drive again, appreciates Dave's help, and shares a view from the living room—a photo of a small town with a mountain in the background. Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a view of a small town with a mountain in the background. Dave: Wow, what an amazing view! Where is it? I haven't seen anything like that before. Calvin: It's from a small town in Japan; the view of the mountains is unbelievably stunning. Dave: Wow! Did you get to that place yet? Calvin: Nope, not yet; I haven't been there before, but it's on my to-do list for after my tour with Frank Ocean ends. Can't wait to see them in person! Look at that snowy peak. Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a person on skis on a snowy mountain. 【Skiing】[Skiing] [Session Date: June 21, 2023] [June 21, 2023, 03:15 PM] Dave: Looks awesome; Have you ever tried skiing before? It looks like loads of fun. Calvin: Haven't tried it before, but it does look like a lot of fun; I might give it a try once. So what's up with you, is anything new in your daily routine?

【Frank Ocean Tour】On October 19, 2023 at 10:11 AM, Calvin reported starting to tour with Frank Ocean, noting the energy from the crowd and a strong connection on stage; Calvin shared an image of a band performing on stage with bright lights. Dave congratulated him and asked how the tour was going. Calvin answered that the tour has been great, the energy from the crowd is awesome, and jamming with Frank Ocean is a dream come true; it's been amazing. 【Collaboration Origin】On October 19, 2023, at 10:11 AM, Dave said to Calvin, "Wow, Calvin! At 10:11 AM, Calvin replied that Dave will be at one of their shows; it's a great experience, and he believes Dave will definitely enjoy it; he added, "Look at this crowd, that was insane!" and shared an image: "Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a large crowd of people in a large auditorium." At 10:11 AM, Dave said that it sounds really exciting, he can't wait to experience it, and he is sure everyone in the crowd is going to be pumped up. 【Tokyo Photo & Crowd Energy】[Tokyo Photo & Crowd Energy]
[Session Date: October 19, 2023]

At 10:11 AM on October 19, 2023, Calvin stated that the crowd energy was amazing and the photo shared by Calvin—a photography of a crowd of people at a concert with their hands in the air—was awesome. Dave replied that the pic was awesome and asked where it was taken. Calvin answered that the photo was taken in Tokyo during a concert, and the energy was nuts, with the whole city coming out.

【Japan】[Japan]
[Session Date: July 07, 2023]

On July 07, 2023 at 07:56 PM, Calvin described a sunset over the river as gorgeous and tranquil, comparing it to living in his Japanese mansion with an epic cityscape, and shared a photo from his backyard of the mansion; the image shows a boat docked in a canal at sunset. Dave replied that the peace by the river is nice, that living in a Japanese mansion surrounded by that city skyline would be stunning, and that the views must be amazing. Calvin added that looking out the windows at the city lights is awe-inspiring, describing luxury and beauty on a whole new level, and shared a photo of the front part of the mansion; the image shows a large house with many windows and lights. Calvin replied that Japan is indeed amazing, can't wait to try the food and check out the culture, and asked Dave if he has ever been there. Dave replied that he has never been to Japan but is keen to go one day, having heard it's full of vibes, good eats and awesome tech, and that experiencing the culture would be amazing; he is hooked on their music. Calvin concluded that Japan has it all—vibes, food, tech, and an amazing culture—and that it's like stepping into another world; he has been working on some cool music collaborations with Japanese artists and is really excited to hear how it turns out. 【Calvin & Dave: Collaboration】[Calvin & Dave: Collaboration] Session Date: July 07, 2023. On July 07, 2023 at 07:56 PM, Dave said that working with them is a great chance and that collaborating with different artists to create something special sounds amazing, and he can't wait for the tunes; Calvin said he'll share some clips when everything's ready and that collaborating with various artists is always exciting, it's a chance to create something unique; Dave added Way to go, Cal, and that he can't wait to see/hear the end product; Calvin said he appreciates the help, it's gonna be awesome and he can't wait to show you, that it was great catching up, and that he has to get back to work now, take care; Dave concluded by telling Cal to take care and not overwork himself, and that they'll talk soon, stay safe.

【Calvin News】On November 17, 2023 at 10:54 AM, Calvin announced that he had accepted an invitation to perform at an upcoming show in Boston, describing it as an unforgettable musical experience and saying he would fill in the details and catch up soon. At 10:54 AM, Dave congratulated Calvin on both the gala attendance and the upcoming performance, expressed eagerness to hear details and possibly attend a Boston show, and asked to be informed when Calvin is free to catch up. Stay safe, talk to you soon!"; Calvin said: "Thanks! You too. Talk to you later!"

【Frank Ocean Tour】Session Date: May 31, 2023. [会话日期：May 31, 2023]

The road can be hard, but when we remember why we're doing it, it keeps us going. Let's keep each other motivated!"

【Calvin's Album Release】On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Calvin stated that last week he hosted a small party at his Japanese house for his new album; a photo of the party in the mansion shows a group of people sitting in a room with a projector screen. Dave asked what it was like when everyone cheered him on. Calvin replied that it was incredible, the room buzzing with energy and love, a powerful reminder of why he's doing this, and included a photo of a group of people standing on top of a stage. Dave commented that creating something that brings people together and inspires them is awesome. Calvin concluded that creating something people connect with and that brings joy is what he's all about, and moments like this motivate him to keep growing.

【Calvin's Music Journey】Session Date: July 21, 2023. At 06:38 PM, Calvin stated he is transforming a Japanese mansion into a recording studio, a space for creating music with other artists and a sanctuary that reminds him why he loves music, and he shared an image described as a photo of a room with a ladder and a ladder in it. Dave complimented the progress and asked what kind of music Calvin has been creating there. Calvin said he has been experimenting with different genres, pushing himself out of his comfort zone, and adding electronic elements to his songs to give them a fresh vibe, describing it as an exciting process of self-discovery and growth. Dave asked whether moving between styles presents any challenges. Calvin replied that switching it up can be tough, but it is a matter of finding the right balance between sticking to his sound and trying new stuff; it can be intimidating, but that makes it exciting and keeps him motivated to continue. He added that he started making music to follow his dreams and is stoked about how far he has come; collaborating with others and learning from them keeps him motivated, and surrounding himself with positive energy and passion helps as well. Dave noted that surrounding oneself with good vibes and collaborating will give a boost and acknowledged the progress achieved so far. Calvin acknowledged the support and stated he would keep pushing himself toward his goals. Dave offered continued encouragement, and Calvin agreed to catch up soon. 【Calvin and the Press】Calvin and the Press; Session Date: July 21, 2023. On July 21, 2023, at 06:38 PM, Dave said: "Yeah, I get it. Finding a balance is tricky but it's gotta keep things interesting. How are you dealing with the pressure and staying motivated?"

It's great to fuel your ideas. Remember that photo you sent me once? Love how this guitar shows our different artistic styles." Image shared by Dave: a photo of a guitar with an octopus on it. At 02:55 PM on the same day, Calvin replied: "Yeah, Dave! It's like every mark and strum holds a story. Take a look." Calvin replied that staying true to himself and being unique in his music is something he values, and it's really great to hear that Dave appreciates it. memories.memory: 【Calvin-Dave Catch-Up】Session Date: May 16, 2023. At 11:50 AM on May 16, 2023, Calvin sent: "Lots has gone down since we last caught up." Dave replied at 11:50 AM on May 16, 2023: "How's everything been going since we last caught up?" 【Flood Incident and Repairs】On May 16, 2023 at 11:50 AM, Calvin stated that last week his place flooded, but he saved his music gear and favorite microphone and is staying positive while awaiting repairs. Dave expressed sympathy and offered help. Calvin then thanked Dave and said he is waiting on insurance to kick in so he can start repairs, fingers crossed it won't take too long. He also invited others to view his creative haven, where he pours his heart into the music, and an image shared by Calvin shows a music studio with a keyboard, synthesizer, and other musical equipment. 【Studio and Music Plans】Studio and Music Plans. Session Date: May 16, 2023. May 16, 2023, 11:50 AM: Dave stated that the studio looks awesome and hopes it gets fixed soon so Cal can continue creating music, and told Cal to hang in there. Calvin replied, thanking Dave, saying he can't wait to get back to making music, and asking whether Dave is working on anything exciting these days.

【Calvin's Accident】On June 21, 2023 at 03:15 PM, Calvin reported that he had a car accident last Friday, June 16, 2023, with no one hurt, and that he has been dealing with insurance and repairs, which are taking up a lot of time and energy; he shared a photo of a red car with a black rim parked on a sidewalk. Dave responded at 03:15 PM that nobody was hurt, acknowledged that dealing with insurance and repairs can be time-consuming and draining, and asked whether there have been any issues in the insurance process so far. 【Insurance Process】Session Date: June 21, 2023. On June 21, 2023 at 03:15 PM, Calvin told Dave that the insurance process was a hassle; it took forever and there was a ton of paperwork, but it's all sorted now, and I'm getting it fixed up, and I can't wait to drive it again. Calvin shared an image of a tow truck parked in a parking lot. Dave asked how long it took to get everything sorted out and said he's glad it's all taken care of now. 【Photo & Costs】Session Date: June 21, 2023. At 03:15 PM, Calvin said it only took a week to sort everything out, he was worried about the cost, but it wasn't too bad, and he shared a photo from the auto repair shop: [Image shared by Calvin: a photography of a man working on a car in a garage]. At 03:15 PM, Dave replied, "Cool! Glad it wasn't too expensive. Who are him?" 【The Mechanic】Session: The Mechanic; Date: June 21, 2023. June 21, 2023, 03:15 PM Calvin: The mechanic knows the stuff and is doing his best to get my car running again; I'm feeling way more confident and excited to show off my car, trusting their expertise. June 21, 2023, 03:15 PM Dave: It's great when you trust the people fixing it; skilled and knowledgeable people are working on your car, and Calvin is feeling confident; it sounds like they're doing a great job, and it'll be back to normal soon.

【Calvin's car after crash】Session Date: July 07, 2023.

On July 07, 2023 at 07:56 PM, Dave asked Calvin how the car was doing after the crash. Calvin replied, "It's all good now, the car's fixed and going strong. Nothing better than cruising around - it's the best! Look at how my car looks right now." He also shared an image: a photograph of a red sports car parked on the side of the road.

【Calvin's Music Journey】Session Date: July 21, 2023. At 06:38 PM, Calvin stated he is transforming a Japanese mansion into a recording studio, a space for creating music with other artists and a sanctuary that reminds him why he loves music, and he shared an image described as a photo of a room with a ladder and a ladder in it. Dave complimented the progress and asked what kind of music Calvin has been creating there. Calvin said he has been experimenting with different genres, pushing himself out of his comfort zone, and adding electronic elements to his songs to give them a fresh vibe, describing it as an exciting process of self-discovery and growth. Dave asked whether moving between styles presents any challenges. Calvin replied that switching it up can be tough, but it is a matter of finding the right balance between sticking to his sound and trying new stuff; it can be intimidating, but that makes it exciting and keeps him motivated to continue. He added that he started making music to follow his dreams and is stoked about how far he has come; collaborating with others and learning from them keeps him motivated, and surrounding himself with positive energy and passion helps as well. Dave noted that surrounding oneself with good vibes and collaborating will give a boost and acknowledged the progress achieved so far. Calvin acknowledged the support and stated he would keep pushing himself toward his goals. Dave offered continued encouragement, and Calvin agreed to catch up soon. 【Calvin and the Press】Calvin and the Press; Session Date: July 21, 2023. On July 21, 2023, at 06:38 PM, Dave said: "Yeah, I get it. Finding a balance is tricky but it's gotta keep things interesting. How are you dealing with the pressure and staying motivated?"

【Calvin's Fan Experience】May 31, 2023, 06:06 PM Dave: 邻居的车发动机有故障，现已由我自己修复；图片由 Dave 分享，显示车库里一名男子正在修理汽车发动机。

May 31, 2023, 06:06 PM Calvin: 这是一次难忘的经历——来自粉丝的能量和爱让人感到疯狂。图片里的车是你为朋友修发动机的那辆吗？修车帮助我放松、清理头脑。 【Dave on Fixing & Transformation】May 31, 2023, 06:06 PM: Dave stated that helping his neighbors with their cars is not difficult and that fixing cars is therapeutic, and he asked Calvin whether it relaxes him as much as it does Dave. Calvin replied that fixing cars calms him and provides a real sense of achievement akin to meditation, and asked Dave if he has hobbies that provide the same satisfaction. Dave added that he is passionate about fixing up things; it is more than a hobby, giving him achievement and purpose, and he gets a buzz from transforming something not working into something that runs smoothly, like giving it a second chance. Calvin found it inspiring that Dave finds purpose in transforming things, including creating something new or collaborating with others, and stated that they are making something great out of nothing. Dave stated that taking something and making it look amazing gives it a new life, making him feel powerful and happy, like he achieved something. Calvin concluded that the feeling of power and happiness is amazing and it's great to see what they created with their hard work and ideas.

【Calvin's Album Release】On September 13, 2023 at 10:56 AM, Calvin told Dave that his album finally dropped on the 11th and that it was a wild feeling, and that everyone’s been loving it and it’s motivated him to keep going. Dave congratulated Calvin on the album release and asked whether it has been overwhelming or inspiring. Calvin replied that it’s been a lot, that seeing everyone get behind it has been awesome, that it’s kinda overwhelming to think so many appreciate it, that it’s also cool that it’s connecting with people, and that it really motivates him to make even better music. Dave said that it’s awesome when your work gets noticed and makes a positive difference and that it must be really motivating for you to keep chasing your dreams. Calvin concluded that moments like this remind him why he got into music—making a difference and sharing his own story—it's exciting to get positive feedback and it gives him strength to keep going and reach more people, and that his journey’s just getting started. 【Calvin's Tour & Visit】Calvin's Tour & Visit. Session Date: September 13, 2023. At 10:56 AM, Dave acknowledged Calvin's progress since they began talking about music and asked what's next. Calvin replied that a tour is next and afterward he will explore and grow his brand. Dave congratulated Calvin on the upcoming tour and asked if any cities or venues were in mind. Calvin said they are hitting some awesome spots and it will be epic. Dave remarked that live music is the best and that Calvin would have a blast on tour and make memories; he offered to show Calvin his garage to see some cool cars and encouraged him to keep rockin'. Calvin accepted the invitation to visit and said it would be fun to check out the garage and perhaps gain ideas for future projects; he would let Dave know when he's in Boston and urged Dave to keep pursuing his passions and keep those cars rolling. Dave shared an image of his garage: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign. Calvin thanked Dave and expressed anticipation for the visit, saying he would take care and continue enjoying his hobbies. Dave thanked Calvin, appreciated the kind words and support, and said he can't wait for the visit, plus to take care and keep creating amazing music; check out pic of my garage, it looks stunning. [Image shared by Dave: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign] Calvin replied that he can't wait for the visit either, and told Dave to take care and keep enjoying his hobbies. Dave replied, Sure thing; thanks again for your help; bye; have a great day. Calvin responded, No problem; always good chatting with you; have an awesome day. Dave concluded, Thanks, Calvin! Catch you later. Have a great day.

【Calvin Goals】On August 03, 2023, at 01:12 PM, Dave asked Calvin what the biggest goal he is working toward is, music-wise or something else. Calvin stated that his plan is to expand his brand worldwide and grow his fanbase, to have his music reach more people and make an impact, to work with artists from around the globe, and to challenge himself to create special music; he looked at the photo of how he performed with the boys last night, noting they are great at the music, and shared an image: Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a band playing on stage with lights on. Dave responded that working with different artists and crafting great sounds will help him reach his goals, and urged him to keep it up and make a difference. Calvin thanked Dave and said he is determined to make his dreams come true. Dave said he was glad to help, eager to see what Calvin does, and encouraged him to stay at it and never forget his dreams. Calvin thanked Dave again, saying he appreciates the support and will keep going for his dreams. Dave added, No problem, stay focused and keep going, you've got this. Calvin replied that he will stay focused and keep going and appreciated Dave's belief.

【Calvin News】On November 17, 2023 at 10:54 AM, Calvin announced that he had accepted an invitation to perform at an upcoming show in Boston, describing it as an unforgettable musical experience and saying he would fill in the details and catch up soon. At 10:54 AM, Dave congratulated Calvin on both the gala attendance and the upcoming performance, expressed eagerness to hear details and possibly attend a Boston show, and asked to be informed when Calvin is free to catch up. Calvin replied at 10:54 AM that he will catch up with Dave when he is in Boston. 【Dave and Calvin Farewell】On November 17, 2023 at 10:54 AM, Dave said: "Looking forward to seeing you. Stay safe, talk to you soon!"; Calvin said: "Thanks! You too. Talk to you later!"

【Calvin's New Car】On March 26, 2023, at 04:45 PM, Calvin announced that he had bought a new car, a luxury car, a dream come true, and that he was stoked. Dave congratulated him and asked how it's driving. Calvin described the car as an amazing ride—super smooth and real powerful, like a rockstar behind the wheel—and thanked Dave. Dave asked if this is his first car, to see a pic, and what's it called. Calvin posted a picture from yesterday when he took it for a ride, saying, “Woohoo! I finally got myself this beauty. Here's a pic from yesterday when I took it for a ride. Can't believe I'm actually driving it. Definitely what I deserve after all this hard work. Every time I step in, it's like an adrenaline rush!” [Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a red sports car parked on the side of the road]. Dave commented that the car looks awesome and that Calvin must feel amazing every time he gets inside, and that he deserved it—congrats buddy. Calvin replied, “Woah, I'm on cloud nine! Hard work pays off.” and asked what's up with you, Dave.

【Calvin's Collaboration Update】2023年3月26日，04:45 PM，Calvin 表示得到了一辆新车并写了几首新曲，上周还有几次录音室录音，对合作感到兴奋，迫不及待想与大家分享。Dave 表示期待听到他的新曲，请随时告知合作进展。Calvin 表示我肯定会让你知道进展。Dave 表示享受合作并保持安全。Calvin 表示会玩得开心并保持安全。
[March 26, 2023, 04:45 PM] Calvin: Got a new ride

9.mflow_response: Home flooded; car crash and repairs.

9.question: When was Calvin's concert in Tokyo?

memories.memory: 【Tokyo Performance】May 16, 2023, 11:50 AM: Calvin expressed excitement for his upcoming performance in Tokyo this month, stating it will be great to share his music with a whole new crowd and hopefully expand his following. May 16, 2023, 11:50 AM: Dave acknowledged the Tokyo show, said the audience will probably love it, and wished Calvin luck, asking to be informed of the outcome. May 16, 2023, 11:50 AM: Calvin replied that he would keep Dave posted, thanked him for the good luck, and shared an image of a city at night with many lights. 【Tokyo Skyline and Visit】Session Date: May 16, 2023. On May 16, 2023, at 11:50 AM, Dave asked where the photo was snapped; Calvin replied that the photo was taken in Tokyo last night and the skyline was stunning; Dave complimented the shot, noting the night skyline really pops with city lights, and stated an intention to visit Tokyo soon; Calvin observed that the city lights there are amazing and encouraged Dave to visit; Dave said he is definitely adding Tokyo to his list.

【Tokyo Interest】Session: Tokyo Interest. Session Date: October 19, 2023. 10:11 AM, Dave says Tokyo looks incredible; he found an online pic that makes him dream about visiting someday, and the energy there seems unbeatable; he asks Calvin if he has ever visited streets like that. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a busy street with people walking and shopping. Calvin replies that yes, that was an incredible experience to visit similar streets like the photo; asks if there is anything else that interests you in Tokyo? 10:11 AM, Dave adds that Tokyo is amazing; he wants to know everything about it—the people, the culture, the food, and the vibrant city life; in the photo below, the city is so alive and colorful that's impressive; it will be an unforgettable experience. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a crowded street at night with people walking and walking. Calvin responds that that photo's a great pic; the lights, the people—so lively; can't wait to hear your emotions when you see that in person. 10:11 AM, Dave concludes that it's really amazing and hopes to see it in person soon. 【Calvin's Tokyo Plan】Session Date: October 19, 2023

At 10:11 AM, Calvin said he is going to Tokyo next month after the tour ends and wishes to revisit places like the photo below, describing the view as great — a city at night with a tall building in the background (image). He stated Shibuya Crossing is Tokyo's Times Square and that he is excited to explore Shinjuku, noting there is amazing food there and he can't wait to try it again, and he shared a photo of Shibuya Crossing at night. Dave replied that Shibuya and Shinjuku are cool spots, Tokyo's food is great, and he will have so much fun exploring all the different places; he asked if Calvin had tried ramen yet and shared a photo of a ramen bowl he tried in Boston, saying it was delicious, but in Tokyo it will be even better (image). Calvin said he has never tried ramen, but it's supposed to be awesome and he will give it a shot in Tokyo. Dave urged, "Do it, Calvin! Once you try it, you'll never go back." Calvin replied that he will definitely give it a shot and appreciates the encouragement.

【Tokyo Show Experience】Session Date: August 14, 2023. On August 14, 2023, at 12:35 AM, Calvin described touring with a well-known artist and performing to connect with the audience; the tour ended with a show in Japan, after which he explored his new place, calling it a dream come true. Dave asked how Tokyo reacted to his music and whether there were any special moments. Calvin reported that the Tokyo show was awesome; everyone was into it when he played one of his songs and sang along, a magical moment. He said such moments make him proud and motivated, and that he is about spreading joy with his art. He noted the buzz of the moment and asked how Dave's project was going, offering encouragement: You've got this; I'm always here for you; seeing your enthusiasm is amazing; keep growing, it'll be worth it. 【Tokyo Show Photos】[Tokyo Show Photos]
[Session Date: August 14, 2023]

On August 14, 2023, at 12:35 AM, Dave asked Calvin for pictures from that show. Calvin replied, "Yeah, here's a pic I took. It was so awesome - I loved how the crowd was into it. These moments are why I love my job." Image shared by Calvin: a photography of a crowd of people at a concert with their hands up. Dave commented, "The energy in that pic is awesome! Seeing everyone with their hands up must have been really cool. It's great when your passion brings joy to others!"

【Calvin's Album Release】On September 13, 2023 at 10:56 AM, Calvin told Dave that his album finally dropped on the 11th and that it was a wild feeling, and that everyone’s been loving it and it’s motivated him to keep going. Dave congratulated Calvin on the album release and asked whether it has been overwhelming or inspiring. Calvin replied that it’s been a lot, that seeing everyone get behind it has been awesome, that it’s kinda overwhelming to think so many appreciate it, that it’s also cool that it’s connecting with people, and that it really motivates him to make even better music. Dave said that it’s awesome when your work gets noticed and makes a positive difference and that it must be really motivating for you to keep chasing your dreams. Calvin concluded that moments like this remind him why he got into music—making a difference and sharing his own story—it's exciting to get positive feedback and it gives him strength to keep going and reach more people, and that his journey’s just getting started. 【Calvin's Tour & Visit】Calvin's Tour & Visit. Session Date: September 13, 2023. At 10:56 AM, Dave acknowledged Calvin's progress since they began talking about music and asked what's next. Calvin replied that a tour is next and afterward he will explore and grow his brand. Dave congratulated Calvin on the upcoming tour and asked if any cities or venues were in mind. Calvin said they are hitting some awesome spots and it will be epic. Dave remarked that live music is the best and that Calvin would have a blast on tour and make memories; he offered to show Calvin his garage to see some cool cars and encouraged him to keep rockin'. Calvin accepted the invitation to visit and said it would be fun to check out the garage and perhaps gain ideas for future projects; he would let Dave know when he's in Boston and urged Dave to keep pursuing his passions and keep those cars rolling. Dave shared an image of his garage: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign. Calvin thanked Dave and expressed anticipation for the visit, saying he would take care and continue enjoying his hobbies. Dave thanked Calvin, appreciated the kind words and support, and said he can't wait for the visit, plus to take care and keep creating amazing music; check out pic of my garage, it looks stunning. [Image shared by Dave: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign] Calvin replied that he can't wait for the visit either, and told Dave to take care and keep enjoying his hobbies. Dave replied, Sure thing; thanks again for your help; bye; have a great day. Calvin responded, No problem; always good chatting with you; have an awesome day. Dave concluded, Thanks, Calvin! Catch you later. Have a great day.

【Calvin's Album Release】On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Calvin stated that last week he hosted a small party at his Japanese house for his new album; a photo of the party in the mansion shows a group of people sitting in a room with a projector screen. Dave congratulated Calvin on his album release and the party, noting the support from family and friends. Calvin responded that it was an awesome feeling seeing everyone come together to celebrate, calling it super rewarding, and pointed to a photo showing a group of people dancing at the party. Dave asked what it was like when everyone cheered him on. Calvin replied that it was incredible, the room buzzing with energy and love, a powerful reminder of why he's doing this, and included a photo of a group of people standing on top of a stage. Dave commented that creating something that brings people together and inspires them is awesome. Calvin concluded that creating something people connect with and that brings joy is what he's all about, and moments like this motivate him to keep growing.

【Tokyo Festival】April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Calvin attended a music festival in Tokyo; the festival was awesome; he did not see any bands but met many talented artists and industry people, finding it enriching. He learned a lot and received advice from professionals in the music industry, and it was inspiring. The producer advised him to stay true to himself and sound unique, which made him think about where he wants his music to go and was motivating. Dave asked what he learned and whether he got any advice, and then asked where he sees his music taking him. 【Boston Trip】April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Calvin states that he dreams of touring the world, performing for different people and connecting with them; he hopes his music reaches a global audience and makes an impact, and he is looking forward to his upcoming trip to Boston after finishing the Frank Ocean tour, having heard that the Boston music scene is awesome and wanting to check it out. April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Dave says the plan is amazing, he will show Calvin around town and all the cool spots; the Boston music scene is awesome, with places like Paradise Rock, House of Blues, and Fenway Park, and Calvin will definitely have some great performances there; he offers to be in the front row when Calvin is onstage; he shares an image described as a city skyline with a boat in the water. April 20, 2023, 04:15 PM: Calvin states that Boston looks great and the tips were helpful, and notes the image of a city skyline with a boat.

【Frank Ocean Tour】On October 19, 2023 at 10:11 AM, Calvin reported starting to tour with Frank Ocean, noting the energy from the crowd and a strong connection on stage; Calvin shared an image of a band performing on stage with bright lights. Dave congratulated him and asked how the tour was going. Calvin answered that the tour has been great, the energy from the crowd is awesome, and jamming with Frank Ocean is a dream come true; it's been amazing. 【Collaboration Origin】On October 19, 2023, at 10:11 AM, Dave said to Calvin, "Wow, Calvin! I bet performing with him is like a dream come true! How did it happen?" Calvin responded that it all started August last year when they met at a festival and he said he wanted to collaborate; they clicked right away and the chemistry on stage was incredible, and he said, "I'm so lucky!" He added, "Check the photo, of how we perfectly look together on stage!" An image shared by Calvin shows a photo of a band performing on stage with a projection of a man on the wall. 【Shows & Audience】Session Date: October 19, 2023. At 10:11 AM, Dave stated that Calvin and Frank are in tune and rock on stage, and that he cannot wait to catch their show. At 10:11 AM, Calvin replied that Dave will be at one of their shows; it's a great experience, and he believes Dave will definitely enjoy it; he added, "Look at this crowd, that was insane!" and shared an image: "Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a large crowd of people in a large auditorium." At 10:11 AM, Dave said that it sounds really exciting, he can't wait to experience it, and he is sure everyone in the crowd is going to be pumped up. 【Tokyo Photo & Crowd Energy】[Tokyo Photo & Crowd Energy]
[Session Date: October 19, 2023]

At 10:11 AM on October 19, 2023, Calvin stated that the crowd energy was amazing and the photo shared by Calvin—a photography of a crowd of people at a concert with their hands in the air—was awesome. Dave replied that the pic was awesome and asked where it was taken. Calvin answered that the photo was taken in Tokyo during a concert, and the energy was nuts, with the whole city coming out.

【Calvin's Tour End】On August 31, 2023 at 02:55 PM, Dave asked Calvin about the end of his tour, saying he bet it was amazing, and shared an image: a photo of a crowd of people at a concert with their hands in the air. Calvin replied that the tour was amazing, he was pumped from the energy of the audience, and the picture totally captures how he felt, such an amazing time, and shared an image: a photo of a crowd of people watching a concert with a large screen. 【Calvin on the Big Stage】Session Date: August 31, 2023. On August 31, 2023 at 02:55 PM, Dave asked Calvin how it felt performing on that big stage. Calvin replied that performing on such a big stage was a dream come true; the energy was incredible and he felt on top of the world; it was surreal. Dave responded that it must have been an incredible experience and congratulated him on achieving such an awesome moment.

【Calvin News】On November 17, 2023 at 10:54 AM, Calvin announced that he had accepted an invitation to perform at an upcoming show in Boston, describing it as an unforgettable musical experience and saying he would fill in the details and catch up soon. At 10:54 AM, Dave congratulated Calvin on both the gala attendance and the upcoming performance, expressed eagerness to hear details and possibly attend a Boston show, and asked to be informed when Calvin is free to catch up. Calvin replied at 10:54 AM that he will catch up with Dave when he is in Boston. 【Dave and Calvin Farewell】On November 17, 2023 at 10:54 AM, Dave said: "Looking forward to seeing you. Stay safe, talk to you soon!"; Calvin said: "Thanks! You too. Talk to you later!"

【Card Night (Dave & Calvin)】On August 22, 2023 at 11:06 AM, Dave reported that last Friday he had a card-night with his friends; the event was fun, they laughed and had a great time, and he shared an image showing a group of men sitting at a table with playing cards. On August 22, 2023 at 11:06 AM, Calvin reported that he scored a deal to continue collaboration with Frank Ocean; This is a dream come true for me, I've been working hard and it's finally paying off. No words can describe how happy I am. 【Frank Ocean in Tokyo】会话日期：2023年8月22日。11:06 AM 时，Dave 向 Calvin 表示祝贺，询问这次机会是如何出现的。Calvin 回答称自己在东京的一场音乐节上遇见 Frank Ocean，二人一见如故，随后一直在交谈并交换创意，双方安排会面，并在 Calvin 的豪宅录音室里录制了一首歌，过程很棒。Dave 表示东京听起来很不可思议。Calvin 继续说城市充满活力，音乐节观众热情，气氛活跃，像为他注入灵感；他还分享了一张照片，照片是夜晚草地上坐着的人群。Dave 询问演出后的合作及是否有即将举行的演出。Calvin 回答称这是梦想成真，音乐节的能量与热情观众让现场氛围极佳，大家都感觉很有联系。Dave 再问是否有其他合作及未来演出。Calvin 答称有人注意到他的演出，如今正在开展合作；他的巡演很快结束，今后将前往波士顿，或许到时可以会面。Dave 表示很高兴，拿到细节后再告知，并在 Calvin 来时见面，期待听到一切消息。

9.mflow_response: Tokyo concert occurred in May 2023.

9.question: Would Calvin enjoy performing at the Hollywood Bowl?
9.gold_answer: Yes; because he enjoys the rush of performing onstage to large crowds

【Dave's Blog Impact】在 November 02, 2023, 05:46 PM，Dave 表示他最近开设了一个关于改装汽车的博客，以与他人分享他的热情，并请求 Calvin 给出博客方面的建议；他还附上一张照片，描述为 "a photography of a car website design"。 Calvin 回应说通过博客分享激情很有趣，并询问是否已经有激励他人的成功案例。 Dave 回应说人们在关注他的博客并向他寻求建议；他最近发了一篇关于让这辆车看起来像野兽的文章，听到它启发他人开始自己的 DIY 项目很棒；图片描述为 "a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot"。 Calvin 夸赞 Dave 的博客很棒，帮助他人发挥创造力，并鼓励继续努力。 Dave 表示感谢他的支持，认为分享知识、帮助他人释放创造力令人感到充实。 Calvin 结束时鼓励 Dave 继续做下去，称他的博客和汽车改装具有启发性，是帮助人们找到创造力的好方式。 【Car Mods】Car Mods
Session Date: November 02, 2023. On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Dave said the car mod was a lot of work but was worth it in the end. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot.

Calvin responded that he understands the satisfaction from fixing cars, as if giving them new life. Dave said that fixing stuff up and seeing it turn out better is great, really rewarding, and gives him a sense of purpose, and it feels like he's making a difference when he fixes someone's car. Calvin noted that Dave must feel great making a real difference in someone's life, like being their superhero. Dave concluded that it's great, it feels really good to make a difference and see their relief when their car is fixed, which makes him proud.

Calvin responded at 12:35 AM that the car is going to look amazing when it's done and asked how long the restoration will take. Dave replied at 12:35 AM that it will be all fixed up by the end of next month. Calvin expressed excitement to see the end result and complimented Dave's talent. Dave acknowledged Calvin's support.

【Car Restoration】October 04, 2023, 02:44 PM: Dave said the Ford Mustang found in a junkyard was in bad shape but had potential, and that working on cars relaxes him. It's awesome seeing the progress and development, both in our projects and ourselves. Hard work really does pay off!" On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Calvin replied: "Yeah, hard work and dedication are definitely key to reaching our goals and potential. It's awesome to see our growth and progress." On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Dave said: "Yeah, it's great to see our progress. It's really motivating and keeps me pushing for more."

【Ferrari Service Stress】On August 03, 2023 at 01:12 PM, Calvin stated that he took his Ferrari for a service and it was stressful, that he is attached to it, and he asked Dave if he could relate and what kind of hobbies give a feeling of restoration. Dave responded that he understands the stress of getting a car serviced; fixing cars is like therapy for him; growing up working on cars with his dad, refurbishing them gives him a sense of fulfillment. On August 03, 2023 at 01:12 PM, Calvin asked remember any good memories from working on cars with your dad? 【Dad Car Restoration Memories】Dad Car Restoration Memories. Session Date: August 03, 2023. On August 03, 2023, 01:12 PM, Dave stated: I have fond memories of working on cars with my dad as a kid; we spent one summer restoring an old car; it was hard work, but seeing the end result and knowing that we did it together was really satisfying. 【Car Project Photo】Car Project Photo. Session Date: August 03, 2023. On August 03, 2023, 01:12 PM, Calvin commented that the collaboration was awesome and that working on projects like that really brings people closer, and asked if there were pictures from that time. 【Music】On November 02, 2023 at 05:46 PM, Calvin stated that music really has a way of touching our souls, and Dave stated that music can really move us and is almost like a language for our souls. 【StudioSetup】On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Calvin stated that he’s aiming for that connection with his music and invited others to take a look at his studio setup, saying it’s look awesome, isn’t it; an image was shared described as a photography of a recording studio with a monitor, keyboard, and monitor. On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Dave praised Calvin’s setup, encouraged him to keep up the great work, and said to take a look at the photo; an image was shared described as a photo of a notebook with a pen and a notepad on it. 【TVViewing】TVViewing. Plus, it's a source of inspiration for me." 【CreativeProcess】Session Date: November 02, 2023. At 05:46 PM, Calvin asked Dave whether this notebook helps stay connected to the creative process. 【Calvin's Album Release】On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Calvin stated that last week he hosted a small party at his Japanese house for his new album; a photo of the party in the mansion shows a group of people sitting in a room with a projector screen. Dave congratulated Calvin on his album release and the party, noting the support from family and friends. Calvin responded that it was an awesome feeling seeing everyone come together to celebrate, calling it super rewarding, and pointed to a photo showing a group of people dancing at the party. Dave asked what it was like when everyone cheered him on. Calvin replied that it was incredible, the room buzzing with energy and love, a powerful reminder of why he's doing this, and included a photo of a group of people standing on top of a stage. Dave commented that creating something that brings people together and inspires them is awesome. Calvin concluded that creating something people connect with and that brings joy is what he's all about, and moments like this motivate him to keep growing.

Calvin thanked Dave and said he is determined to make his dreams come true. Dave said he was glad to help, eager to see what Calvin does, and encouraged him to stay at it and never forget his dreams. Calvin thanked Dave again, saying he appreciates the support and will keep going for his dreams. Dave added, No problem, stay focused and keep going, you've got this. Calvin replied that he will stay focused and keep going and appreciated Dave's belief.

【Old Friend in Boston】On November 13, 2023, at 09:15 PM, Calvin invited his old high school buddy to see him perform in Boston; he described it as insane, noted it reminded him how far he has come and how important relationships are in this biz, and he felt good. Dave responded that it's great and that seeing his old friend must have brought back memories, and that it's awesome to have someone who's been there since the start to support us. Calvin recalled nostalgia from freestyling and discussing getting famous; life has changed, but being around certain people still sparks those same feelings; take a look at how we freestyled when we were teenagers! [Image shared by Calvin: a photography of two men standing on a sidewalk with a car in the background] Dave: Wow, that's a great pic! Did that person make a big difference during your trip? Calvin: He's been such a great friend to me. Always there to support and encourage me. His positivity has made a big difference in my journey. Dave: It's great how someone's support and encouragement can really shape our lives! They give us the motivation to keep going and trust ourselves. Do you also find having supportive people around you important for your artist development? Calvin: Having supportive people is key for me to grow as an artist. They motivate me to get better and stay true to myself. Having support is vital, especially in this tough music industry. Take a look at this photo! [Calvin 分享的图片：一名男子坐在桌子前，桌前有一台电脑] 【Music Studio Experiments】Session Date: November 13, 2023. Calvin replied that he is having fun trying out new sounds and pushing the boundaries, that going for new ideas and seeing where it takes him is great, and that he must stay ahead. Dave stated that experimenting and pushing boundaries are key to making their art grow and that he can't wait to see where these new ideas take Calvin. Calvin said it's exciting to see where these new ideas lead and that growing and evolving is the focus. Dave asserted that growing and evolving are key for any artist, urged not to stop pushing oneself and to keep exploring, and that he can't wait to see what Calvin comes up with next.

【Calvin's Album Release】On September 13, 2023 at 10:56 AM, Calvin told Dave that his album finally dropped on the 11th and that it was a wild feeling, and that everyone’s been loving it and it’s motivated him to keep going. Dave congratulated Calvin on the album release and asked whether it has been overwhelming or inspiring. Calvin replied that it’s been a lot, that seeing everyone get behind it has been awesome, that it’s kinda overwhelming to think so many appreciate it, that it’s also cool that it’s connecting with people, and that it really motivates him to make even better music. Dave said that it’s awesome when your work gets noticed and makes a positive difference and that it must be really motivating for you to keep chasing your dreams. Calvin concluded that moments like this remind him why he got into music—making a difference and sharing his own story—it's exciting to get positive feedback and it gives him strength to keep going and reach more people, and that his journey’s just getting started. 【Calvin's Tour & Visit】Calvin's Tour & Visit. Session Date: September 13, 2023. At 10:56 AM, Dave acknowledged Calvin's progress since they began talking about music and asked what's next. Calvin replied that a tour is next and afterward he will explore and grow his brand. Dave congratulated Calvin on the upcoming tour and asked if any cities or venues were in mind. Calvin said they are hitting some awesome spots and it will be epic. Dave remarked that live music is the best and that Calvin would have a blast on tour and make memories; he offered to show Calvin his garage to see some cool cars and encouraged him to keep rockin'. Calvin accepted the invitation to visit and said it would be fun to check out the garage and perhaps gain ideas for future projects; he would let Dave know when he's in Boston and urged Dave to keep pursuing his passions and keep those cars rolling. Dave shared an image of his garage: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign. Calvin thanked Dave and expressed anticipation for the visit, saying he would take care and continue enjoying his hobbies. Dave thanked Calvin, appreciated the kind words and support, and said he can't wait for the visit, plus to take care and keep creating amazing music; check out pic of my garage, it looks stunning. [Image shared by Dave: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign] Calvin replied that he can't wait for the visit either, and told Dave to take care and keep enjoying his hobbies. Dave replied, Sure thing; thanks again for your help; bye; have a great day. Calvin responded, No problem; always good chatting with you; have an awesome day. Dave concluded, Thanks, Calvin! Catch you later. Have a great day.

[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Dave: Hey Calvin! 【Dave's Blog Impact】在 November 02, 2023, 05:46 PM，Dave 表示他最近开设了一个关于改装汽车的博客，以与他人分享他的热情，并请求 Calvin 给出博客方面的建议；他还附上一张照片，描述为 "a photography of a car website design"。 Calvin 回应说通过博客分享激情很有趣，并询问是否已经有激励他人的成功案例。 Dave 回应说人们在关注他的博客并向他寻求建议；他最近发了一篇关于让这辆车看起来像野兽的文章，听到它启发他人开始自己的 DIY 项目很棒；图片描述为 "a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot"。 Calvin 夸赞 Dave 的博客很棒，帮助他人发挥创造力，并鼓励继续努力。 Dave 表示感谢他的支持，认为分享知识、帮助他人释放创造力令人感到充实。 Calvin 结束时鼓励 Dave 继续做下去，称他的博客和汽车改装具有启发性，是帮助人们找到创造力的好方式。 【Car Mods】Car Mods

Calvin noted that Dave must feel great making a real difference in someone's life, like being their superhero. Dave concluded that it's great, it feels really good to make a difference and see their relief when their car is fixed, which makes him proud.

【Dave's Car Maintenance Shop Launch】May 01, 2023, 06:24 PM，Dave宣布自己开设了自营汽车维护店，并分享了一张图片，内容为一间汽车经销商，前方停放着多辆汽车。Calvin对开业表示祝贺，认为Dave的努力和奉献已得到回报，并附上另一张照片，显示一名男子在车库里检查车辆。Dave感谢Calvin的支持，称开设这家店是他的梦想，尽管付出了大量努力，但看到店铺开始运作，还是值得。他表示这也是他实现另一个梦想的步骤，即从事经典汽车工作，热爱它们的设计与工程。Calvin称赞Dave在经典车领域的勇气和野心，认为追求经典车很酷，强调实现梦想的重要性。Dave说自己痴迷于经典车，去年曾修复过一辆，觉得让它重获新生没有比这更棒的事；并附上被修复汽车发动机的照片，照片中发动机带有一个小型空气滤清器。Calvin回应照片很棒；Dave表示这是一项充满爱意的劳动，虽有挑战但非常值得。两人讨论到看到自己创作的东西“活起来”的成就感，以及把努力变成现实所带来的满足，彼此认为这是奉献与热情的最佳融合，并鼓励继续努力。Dave表示会继续努力，并提到这是一张自己店面的照片，若有时间请对方来参观，最后附上一张一群人站在一辆车前的照片。 【Dave's Car Services & Rewards】Session Date: May 01, 2023. At 06:24 PM, Calvin asked what sort of cars the shop works on. Dave replied that he works on all kinds of cars at the shop—from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars—and that it keeps him busy and happy. Calvin stated that working on cars must be really rewarding. Dave said he is passionate about working on cars, that doing it every day is rewarding, that seeing the transformation is awesome, and that helping people keep their cars in good condition is satisfying. Calvin noted that doing something you love and helping others is rewarding. Dave expressed appreciation for the encouragement, saying it means a lot that his work is valued and that it brings joy to others.

【Ferrari Service Stress】On August 03, 2023 at 01:12 PM, Calvin stated that he took his Ferrari for a service and it was stressful, that he is attached to it, and he asked Dave if he could relate and what kind of hobbies give a feeling of restoration. Dave responded that he understands the stress of getting a car serviced; fixing cars is like therapy for him; growing up working on cars with his dad, refurbishing them gives him a sense of fulfillment. On August 03, 2023 at 01:12 PM, Calvin asked remember any good memories from working on cars with your dad? 【Dad Car Restoration Memories】Dad Car Restoration Memories. Session Date: August 03, 2023. On August 03, 2023, 01:12 PM, Dave stated: I have fond memories of working on cars with my dad as a kid; we spent one summer restoring an old car; it was hard work, but seeing the end result and knowing that we did it together was really satisfying. 【Car Project Photo】Car Project Photo. [Session Date: August 11, 2023]

On August 11, 2023 at 05:22 PM, Calvin asked Dave what transformations he had done so far and how the current project was going. Dave replied that he has been working on the car, performing engine swaps and suspension modifications, and is now learning about body modifications; giving this classic muscle car a modern twist is a challenge but fun. An image shared by Dave shows a silver corvette parked in front of a building. Calvin commented that it looks cool and that the silver finish gives it a modern twist. Dave said he wanted a modern vibe but also that classic muscle car style and that he is really happy with it. Calvin acknowledged the work and attention to detail. Dave said the small details make it unique and personalized. Calvin said that customizing a masterpiece with those small details is what makes it unique and personalized. Dave stated that it's about showing his style, like customizing a work of art on wheels. 【Calvin's Music Commitments】Session Date: August 11, 2023. At 05:22 PM Calvin encouraged Dave, noting his enthusiasm and hard work in everything he does and urging him to keep coming up with new cool stuff, expressing excitement to see what Dave will do next. At 05:22 PM Calvin said he is super busy with his music at the moment and will keep it in mind. At 05:22 PM Dave said No worries, got it, good luck with your music. At 05:22 PM Calvin said thanks for the encouragement; he'll keep working hard and making music.

【Dave's car passion】Session Date: October 23, 2023. At 02:17 PM, Dave said: Cars give me an outlet to express myself, an oasis of calm; when I'm working on one, I'm connecting back with myself, and the music helps too; look at my garage, a little dirty, but everything is in its place. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a garage with a bunch of tools hanging on the wall. Calvin: Looking cool - what made you start working on cars? Dave: Ever since I was ten, I've been fascinated with how machines work; I found an old car in a neighbor's garage and asked if I could fix it; that's when my love for car engineering began; I enjoyed transforming it from broken-down to high-running, and that sense of accomplishment made me hooked—so I've been working on cars ever since. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a man working on a car in a garage. 【Car restoration journey】Session Date: October 23, 2023.

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Calvin: Restoring that car must have required a lot of skill and determination; was it a classic car, and do you still have it or are you currently working on another project?

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Dave: It was a fun project; I restored a car last year, but sold it to a collector; now I'm working on something new, and it's quite a challenge; I shared an image of a black car parked in a parking lot.

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Calvin: Cool; I have been wanting to try car restoration, and what is the toughest part of car restoration? 【Attention to detail in craft】On October 23, 2023, at 02:17 PM, Dave stated that paying attention to detail takes a lot of patience, but the payoff is worth it, and that paying extra attention to detail isn't easy, but it pays off. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that details can really make a difference and are what makes something great, such as a well-crafted rap song or a sleek and stylish car. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that paying attention to those small details makes a difference; without them, it's just average; as an artist, he wants to create something extraordinary. At 02:17 PM, Dave stated that that's great, Calvin, and that the attention to detail in your work makes it extra special; keep on creating. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a brown amp with a black knob and a brown cover. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated thanks, appreciating your support.

【Dave's Car Project】会话日期：2023-10-08。2023-10-08 15:13，Dave 表示：上周五（2023-10-06）他去了车展，看到许多酷车并参与了车改装，现场有大量酷机器，十分有趣；他展示了一辆美丽的车的图片，图片描述为“两名男子看着车引擎”。Calvin 回应：这听起来很棒，他对激动人心的汽车很感兴趣，不能等着看 Dave 的车库，并分享了一张红色跑车在展厅停放的照片。Dave 回复：感谢，这辆车确实很棒，他自己修复并改装了这辆车，添加了定制排气和一些性能升级，声音很甜美，对结果感到非常骄傲。Calvin 表示赞叹，称这是一个大师级的作品，印象深刻，并分享了一张在交通信号灯下的街道上行驶的照片。
[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Dave: Hey Calvin! What 【Dave's Passion】[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Dave: Thanks Calvin; I've spent a lot of time and effort on it; it's not just a hobby, it's a passion; it's like therapy, a way to get away from everyday stress; as a kid I spent hours in my dad's garage tinkering with engines, which was my sanctuary; now I do this as a job, taking something broken and making it into something awesome.

[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Calvin: Wow, Dave, that's amazing; bringing broken things back to life is very satisfying; working on cars can be an escape from reality, and I understand that feeling; doing what you love for a living is the ultimate goal, keep going—it's inspiring.

[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Dave: Thanks, Calvin; it's been my goal since I was a kid to do something I love, and it's awesome to be able to do it; restoring things like this can be tough, but the feeling of accomplishment it gives is great; absolutely, I'm loving it. 【Calvin's Support】On October 08, 2023, at 03:13 PM, Calvin encouraged Dave to go for it, noting that chasing dreams is what life’s about and that it’s awesome to see how far Dave has come, urging him to keep working hard and living his best life; Dave thanked Calvin, said he would continue chasing his dreams and working hard, and that conversations like this remind him why he loves what he does. Calvin said he’s glad to remind him and that he’ll always be there to support him and give him a boost, noting that Dave is doing great. Dave replied that Calvin’s support means a lot, that he’ll stay focused and keep going, and that he appreciates the encouragement. Calvin reaffirmed that he’ll always be there to support Dave and give him that boost and that Dave is doing great. Dave again thanked Calvin, saying Calvin’s support means everything to him and that he’ll keep pushing and reaching for them. Calvin concluded, No worries, Dave. Keep going for it. You got this!

【San Francisco workshop】San Francisco workshop. Session Date: August 14, 2023. At 12:35 AM on August 14, 2023, Dave reported attending a car workshop in San Francisco, focusing on car restoration techniques; participants were passionate and dedicated. Calvin responded that car workshops are cool and inspiring, and expressed gladness that Dave found something that really gets him going. 【Dave's car restoration】Session Date: August 14, 2023. At 12:35 AM, Dave stated the project is going great and shared an image of the car he's restoring—a car with a broken engine in the woods. Calvin responded at 12:35 AM that the car is going to look amazing when it's done and asked how long the restoration will take. Dave replied at 12:35 AM that it will be all fixed up by the end of next month. Calvin expressed excitement to see the end result and complimented Dave's talent. Dave acknowledged Calvin's support.

【Dave's Car Maintenance Shop Launch】May 01, 2023, 06:24 PM，Dave宣布自己开设了自营汽车维护店，并分享了一张图片，内容为一间汽车经销商，前方停放着多辆汽车。Calvin对开业表示祝贺，认为Dave的努力和奉献已得到回报，并附上另一张照片，显示一名男子在车库里检查车辆。Dave感谢Calvin的支持，称开设这家店是他的梦想，尽管付出了大量努力，但看到店铺开始运作，还是值得。他表示这也是他实现另一个梦想的步骤，即从事经典汽车工作，热爱它们的设计与工程。Calvin称赞Dave在经典车领域的勇气和野心，认为追求经典车很酷，强调实现梦想的重要性。Dave说自己痴迷于经典车，去年曾修复过一辆，觉得让它重获新生没有比这更棒的事；并附上被修复汽车发动机的照片，照片中发动机带有一个小型空气滤清器。Calvin回应照片很棒；Dave表示这是一项充满爱意的劳动，虽有挑战但非常值得。两人讨论到看到自己创作的东西“活起来”的成就感，以及把努力变成现实所带来的满足，彼此认为这是奉献与热情的最佳融合，并鼓励继续努力。Dave表示会继续努力，并提到这是一张自己店面的照片，若有时间请对方来参观，最后附上一张一群人站在一辆车前的照片。 【Dave's Car Services & Rewards】Session Date: May 01, 2023. At 06:24 PM, Calvin asked what sort of cars the shop works on. Dave replied that he works on all kinds of cars at the shop—from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars—and that it keeps him busy and happy. Calvin stated that working on cars must be really rewarding. Dave said he is passionate about working on cars, that doing it every day is rewarding, that seeing the transformation is awesome, and that helping people keep their cars in good condition is satisfying. Calvin noted that doing something you love and helping others is rewarding. Dave expressed appreciation for the encouragement, saying it means a lot that his work is valued and that it brings joy to others.

【Dave and Calvin: Car Repairs】Session Date: September 02, 2023. On September 02, 2023, at 09:19 AM, Dave stated that he has been tied up with car stuff lately and that yesterday he came back from San Francsico with some great insights and knowledge on car modification that he wants to share, and that changing things around and giving an old car a new life is satisfying. Calvin responded that he understands the satisfaction from fixing cars, as if giving them new life. Dave said that fixing stuff up and seeing it turn out better is great, really rewarding, and gives him a sense of purpose, and it feels like he's making a difference when he fixes someone's car. Calvin noted that Dave must feel great making a real difference in someone's life, like being their superhero. Dave concluded that it's great, it feels really good to make a difference and see their relief when their car is fixed, which makes him proud.

【Dave's Car Shop Opening】On May 16, 2023, at 11:50 AM, Dave stated that he opened his car shop last week, invited some friends over to celebrate, and that it has been amazing and incredible so far; he is excited to share his passion and help out with folks' rides. Calvin responded, "Way to go, Dave! Congrats on opening your own car shop! Your excitement is contagious. Keep up the great work!" Dave then replied, "Thanks, Calvin! Your support is greatly appreciated. It's been quite a journey so far, and I'm excited to see what the future holds. How about you? Anything exciting happening in the world of music for you?"

【Dave's Vintage Car Engine】On September 22, 2023 at 08:57 PM, Dave worked on the engine of the vintage Mustang, thought he'd fixed it, started it up, heard a weird noise, and found it disappointing after putting so much work in; he shared an image: "Image shared by Dave: a photography of a car engine with a small engine." On the same date and time, Calvin shared an image: "Image shared by Calvin: a photography of a red sports car parked in a parking lot" and stated that the image is a sign of his hard work and dedication and that looking at it reminds him how far he's come. Dave replied that he loves the way the sunlight hits the image, calls it a great symbol of all Calvin's hard work, asks whether Calvin feels really proud when he looks at it, and asks about any special memories with it.

【Local Garage Partnership】在 2023 年 5 月 3 日 01:16 PM，Dave 宣布与当地一家车库建立合作关系，并分享了一张车库内一辆车正在维修的照片。Calvin 同日以 01:16 PM 回复，祝贺这一当地车库合作，表示自上次聊天以来看到他追随热情的发展很受鼓舞，并称取得的进展令人印象深刻。Dave 同日再次回复，表示自己很喜欢这份工作，能与优秀的机械师共事并分享自己对汽车的知识；他目前正在进行一个很酷的项目，尽管有挑战性，并附上一张照片，照片显示一名男子在车库内对汽车发动机进行作业。
[May 03, 2023, 01:16 PM] Dave: Hey Calvin! Long 【Custom Car Project】会话日期：May 03, 2023, 01:16 PM。Calvin 表示：那辆车看起来很棒，你投入了大量努力，看到最终结果很棒，请继续努力，你接下来有什么计划？Dave 表示：感谢 Calvin，感谢你的支持。我将继续学习汽车工程，也许有一天从零开始打造一辆定制车——那就是梦想！现在将继续推进本项目并为客户提供帮助。Calvin 表示：Dave，你真的很鼓舞人心，为实现梦想而努力——这是好事。定制汽车听起来很棒，也别忘了放松并享受这个过程。

【Ferrari Service Stress】On August 03, 2023 at 01:12 PM, Calvin stated that he took his Ferrari for a service and it was stressful, that he is attached to it, and he asked Dave if he could relate and what kind of hobbies give a feeling of restoration. Dave responded that he understands the stress of getting a car serviced; fixing cars is like therapy for him; growing up working on cars with his dad, refurbishing them gives him a sense of fulfillment. On August 03, 2023 at 01:12 PM, Calvin asked remember any good memories from working on cars with your dad? 【Dad Car Restoration Memories】Dad Car Restoration Memories. Session Date: August 03, 2023. On August 03, 2023, 01:12 PM, Dave stated: I have fond memories of working on cars with my dad as a kid; we spent one summer restoring an old car; it was hard work, but seeing the end result and knowing that we did it together was really satisfying. 【Car Project Photo】Car Project Photo. Session Date: August 03, 2023. On August 03, 2023, 01:12 PM, Calvin commented that the collaboration was awesome and that working on projects like that really brings people closer, and asked if there were pictures from that time. Calvin concluded that Japan has it all—vibes, food, tech, and an amazing culture—and that it's like stepping into another world; he has been working on some cool music collaborations with Japanese artists and is really excited to hear how it turns out. 【Calvin & Dave: Collaboration】[Calvin & Dave: Collaboration] Session Date: July 07, 2023.
