【Dave's Car Project】会话日期：2023-10-08。2023-10-08 15:13，Dave 表示：上周五（2023-10-06）他去了车展，看到许多酷车并参与了车改装，现场有大量酷机器，十分有趣；他展示了一辆美丽的车的图片，图片描述为“两名男子看着车引擎”。Calvin 回应：这听起来很棒，他对激动人心的汽车很感兴趣，不能等着看 Dave 的车库，并分享了一张红色跑车在展厅停放的照片。Dave 回复：感谢，这辆车确实很棒，他自己修复并改装了这辆车，添加了定制排气和一些性能升级，声音很甜美，对结果感到非常骄傲。Calvin 表示赞叹，称这是一个大师级的作品，印象深刻，并分享了一张在交通信号灯下的街道上行驶的照片。
[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Dave: Hey Calvin! What 【Dave's Passion】[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Dave: Thanks Calvin; I've spent a lot of time and effort on it; it's not just a hobby, it's a passion; it's like therapy, a way to get away from everyday stress; as a kid I spent hours in my dad's garage tinkering with engines, which was my sanctuary; now I do this as a job, taking something broken and making it into something awesome.

[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Calvin: Wow, Dave, that's amazing; bringing broken things back to life is very satisfying; working on cars can be an escape from reality, and I understand that feeling; doing what you love for a living is the ultimate goal, keep going—it's inspiring.

[October 08, 2023, 03:13 PM] Dave: Thanks, Calvin; it's been my goal since I was a kid to do something I love, and it's awesome to be able to do it; restoring things like this can be tough, but the feeling of accomplishment it gives is great; absolutely, I'm loving it. 【Calvin's Support】On October 08, 2023, at 03:13 PM, Calvin encouraged Dave to go for it, noting that chasing dreams is what life’s about and that it’s awesome to see how far Dave has come, urging him to keep working hard and living his best life; Dave thanked Calvin, said he would continue chasing his dreams and working hard, and that conversations like this remind him why he loves what he does. Calvin said he’s glad to remind him and that he’ll always be there to support him and give him a boost, noting that Dave is doing great. Dave replied that Calvin’s support means a lot, that he’ll stay focused and keep going, and that he appreciates the encouragement. Calvin reaffirmed that he’ll always be there to support Dave and give him that boost and that Dave is doing great. Dave again thanked Calvin, saying Calvin’s support means everything to him and that he’ll keep pushing and reaching for them. Calvin concluded, No worries, Dave. Keep going for it. You got this!

【Car Restoration】October 04, 2023, 02:44 PM: Dave said the Ford Mustang found in a junkyard was in bad shape but had potential, and that working on cars relaxes him. Calvin asked for pictures of the finished result. Dave provided a photo, stated that he put in a lot of work restoring it, the result is awesome, and that it is satisfying to bring an old car back to life; Image shared by Dave: a photography of a red car parked in a field with other cars. Calvin said they have been greatly privileged to have been granted this opportunity and that it’s satisfying to bring it back to life; Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a person's hand with dirty hands next to a car. Dave stated that it is very satisfying, noting that his hands after a day in the garage are permanently stained with grease, but it’s worth it when you see the end result; Image shared by Dave: a photography of a person's hands with dirt on them. 【Pride and Small Wins】Session Date: October 04, 2023. At 02:44 PM on October 04, 2023, Calvin observed that Dave's hands showed he worked hard, that he put in lots of effort, and that Dave should definitely be proud. Dave thanked Calvin, saying he loves being able to transform something old and beat-up into something beautiful, and that the small successes make him feel proud and fulfilled. Calvin added that those little wins matter, give us a sense of accomplishment and joy, and that it is truly inspiring to see how much we can grow. 【Progress and Motivation】On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Dave told Calvin: "Sure, Calvin! It's awesome seeing the progress and development, both in our projects and ourselves. Hard work really does pay off!" On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Calvin replied: "Yeah, hard work and dedication are definitely key to reaching our goals and potential. It's awesome to see our growth and progress." On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Dave said: "Yeah, it's great to see our progress. It's really motivating and keeps me pushing for more."

【San Francisco workshop】San Francisco workshop. Session Date: August 14, 2023. At 12:35 AM on August 14, 2023, Dave reported attending a car workshop in San Francisco, focusing on car restoration techniques; participants were passionate and dedicated. Calvin responded that car workshops are cool and inspiring, and expressed gladness that Dave found something that really gets him going. 【Dave's car restoration】Session Date: August 14, 2023. At 12:35 AM, Dave stated the project is going great and shared an image of the car he's restoring—a car with a broken engine in the woods. Calvin responded at 12:35 AM that the car is going to look amazing when it's done and asked how long the restoration will take. Dave replied at 12:35 AM that it will be all fixed up by the end of next month. Calvin expressed excitement to see the end result and complimented Dave's talent. Dave acknowledged Calvin's support.

【Dave's Vintage Car Engine】On September 22, 2023 at 08:57 PM, Dave worked on the engine of the vintage Mustang, thought he'd fixed it, started it up, heard a weird noise, and found it disappointing after putting so much work in; he shared an image: "Image shared by Dave: a photography of a car engine with a small engine." On the same date and time, Calvin shared an image: "Image shared by Calvin: a photography of a red sports car parked in a parking lot" and stated that the image is a sign of his hard work and dedication and that looking at it reminds him how far he's come. Dave replied that he loves the way the sunlight hits the image, calls it a great symbol of all Calvin's hard work, asks whether Calvin feels really proud when he looks at it, and asks about any special memories with it.

【Dave's Car Maintenance Shop Launch】May 01, 2023, 06:24 PM，Dave宣布自己开设了自营汽车维护店，并分享了一张图片，内容为一间汽车经销商，前方停放着多辆汽车。Calvin对开业表示祝贺，认为Dave的努力和奉献已得到回报，并附上另一张照片，显示一名男子在车库里检查车辆。Dave感谢Calvin的支持，称开设这家店是他的梦想，尽管付出了大量努力，但看到店铺开始运作，还是值得。他表示这也是他实现另一个梦想的步骤，即从事经典汽车工作，热爱它们的设计与工程。Calvin称赞Dave在经典车领域的勇气和野心，认为追求经典车很酷，强调实现梦想的重要性。Dave说自己痴迷于经典车，去年曾修复过一辆，觉得让它重获新生没有比这更棒的事；并附上被修复汽车发动机的照片，照片中发动机带有一个小型空气滤清器。Calvin回应照片很棒；Dave表示这是一项充满爱意的劳动，虽有挑战但非常值得。两人讨论到看到自己创作的东西“活起来”的成就感，以及把努力变成现实所带来的满足，彼此认为这是奉献与热情的最佳融合，并鼓励继续努力。Dave表示会继续努力，并提到这是一张自己店面的照片，若有时间请对方来参观，最后附上一张一群人站在一辆车前的照片。 【Dave's Car Services & Rewards】Session Date: May 01, 2023. At 06:24 PM, Calvin asked what sort of cars the shop works on. Dave replied that he works on all kinds of cars at the shop—from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars—and that it keeps him busy and happy. Calvin stated that working on cars must be really rewarding. Dave said he is passionate about working on cars, that doing it every day is rewarding, that seeing the transformation is awesome, and that helping people keep their cars in good condition is satisfying. Calvin noted that doing something you love and helping others is rewarding. Dave expressed appreciation for the encouragement, saying it means a lot that his work is valued and that it brings joy to others.

【Dave's car passion】Session Date: October 23, 2023. At 02:17 PM, Dave said: Cars give me an outlet to express myself, an oasis of calm; when I'm working on one, I'm connecting back with myself, and the music helps too; look at my garage, a little dirty, but everything is in its place. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a garage with a bunch of tools hanging on the wall. Calvin: Looking cool - what made you start working on cars? Dave: Ever since I was ten, I've been fascinated with how machines work; I found an old car in a neighbor's garage and asked if I could fix it; that's when my love for car engineering began; I enjoyed transforming it from broken-down to high-running, and that sense of accomplishment made me hooked—so I've been working on cars ever since. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a man working on a car in a garage. 【Car restoration journey】Session Date: October 23, 2023.

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Calvin: Restoring that car must have required a lot of skill and determination; was it a classic car, and do you still have it or are you currently working on another project?

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Dave: It was a fun project; I restored a car last year, but sold it to a collector; now I'm working on something new, and it's quite a challenge; I shared an image of a black car parked in a parking lot.

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Calvin: Cool; I have been wanting to try car restoration, and what is the toughest part of car restoration? 【Attention to detail in craft】On October 23, 2023, at 02:17 PM, Dave stated that paying attention to detail takes a lot of patience, but the payoff is worth it, and that paying extra attention to detail isn't easy, but it pays off. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that details can really make a difference and are what makes something great, such as a well-crafted rap song or a sleek and stylish car. At 02:17 PM, Dave stated that paying attention to details makes a big difference, whether in music or with vehicles, and that little things can make a big impact. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that paying attention to those small details makes a difference; without them, it's just average; as an artist, he wants to create something extraordinary. Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a silver disc in a black frame on a table. At 02:17 PM, Dave stated that that's great, Calvin, and that the attention to detail in your work makes it extra special; keep on creating. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a brown amp with a black knob and a brown cover. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated thanks, appreciating your support.

【Dave and Calvin: Car Repairs】Session Date: September 02, 2023. On September 02, 2023, at 09:19 AM, Dave stated that he has been tied up with car stuff lately and that yesterday he came back from San Francsico with some great insights and knowledge on car modification that he wants to share, and that changing things around and giving an old car a new life is satisfying. Calvin responded that he understands the satisfaction from fixing cars, as if giving them new life. Dave said that fixing stuff up and seeing it turn out better is great, really rewarding, and gives him a sense of purpose, and it feels like he's making a difference when he fixes someone's car. Calvin noted that Dave must feel great making a real difference in someone's life, like being their superhero. Dave concluded that it's great, it feels really good to make a difference and see their relief when their car is fixed, which makes him proud.

【Dave's Car Mod Workshop】On August 11, 2023, at 05:22 PM, Dave told Calvin that he had been picked for a car mod workshop, that he is going to get better at it and learn something new, and referenced an image: a photography of a man standing in front of a car on a lift. Calvin congratulated Dave and asked if there are any mods or projects he's excited to work on. Dave replied that this is a dream come true for him, as he has always wanted to learn auto engineering and build a custom car. Calvin responded that pursuing auto engineering and making a custom car is a great experience, and asked what he thinks is the most thrilling part. Dave stated that the most thrilling part is seeing the potential come to life, referencing an image: a photo of a car is being worked on by a mechanic. 【Car Modifications】[Car Modifications]
[Session Date: August 11, 2023]

On August 11, 2023 at 05:22 PM, Calvin asked Dave what transformations he had done so far and how the current project was going. Dave replied that he has been working on the car, performing engine swaps and suspension modifications, and is now learning about body modifications; giving this classic muscle car a modern twist is a challenge but fun. An image shared by Dave shows a silver corvette parked in front of a building. Calvin commented that it looks cool and that the silver finish gives it a modern twist. Dave said he wanted a modern vibe but also that classic muscle car style and that he is really happy with it. Calvin acknowledged the work and attention to detail. Dave said the small details make it unique and personalized. Calvin said that customizing a masterpiece with those small details is what makes it unique and personalized. Dave stated that it's about showing his style, like customizing a work of art on wheels. 【Calvin's Music Commitments】Session Date: August 11, 2023. At 05:22 PM Calvin encouraged Dave, noting his enthusiasm and hard work in everything he does and urging him to keep coming up with new cool stuff, expressing excitement to see what Dave will do next. At 05:22 PM Dave replied that he appreciates Calvin's help, will keep working hard and coming up with new cool stuff, offered to help with Calvin's music, and shared his music studio setup with a high-quality sound system; an image shared by Dave shows a desk with a keyboard, monitor, and keyboard pad. At 05:22 PM Calvin said he is super busy with his music at the moment and will keep it in mind. At 05:22 PM Dave said No worries, got it, good luck with your music. At 05:22 PM Calvin said thanks for the encouragement; he'll keep working hard and making music.

【Dave's Blog Impact】在 November 02, 2023, 05:46 PM，Dave 表示他最近开设了一个关于改装汽车的博客，以与他人分享他的热情，并请求 Calvin 给出博客方面的建议；他还附上一张照片，描述为 "a photography of a car website design"。 Calvin 回应说通过博客分享激情很有趣，并询问是否已经有激励他人的成功案例。 Dave 回应说人们在关注他的博客并向他寻求建议；他最近发了一篇关于让这辆车看起来像野兽的文章，听到它启发他人开始自己的 DIY 项目很棒；图片描述为 "a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot"。 Calvin 夸赞 Dave 的博客很棒，帮助他人发挥创造力，并鼓励继续努力。 Dave 表示感谢他的支持，认为分享知识、帮助他人释放创造力令人感到充实。 Calvin 结束时鼓励 Dave 继续做下去，称他的博客和汽车改装具有启发性，是帮助人们找到创造力的好方式。 【Car Mods】Car Mods
Session Date: November 02, 2023. On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Dave said the car mod was a lot of work but was worth it in the end. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot.

【Local Garage Partnership】在 2023 年 5 月 3 日 01:16 PM，Dave 宣布与当地一家车库建立合作关系，并分享了一张车库内一辆车正在维修的照片。Calvin 同日以 01:16 PM 回复，祝贺这一当地车库合作，表示自上次聊天以来看到他追随热情的发展很受鼓舞，并称取得的进展令人印象深刻。Dave 同日再次回复，表示自己很喜欢这份工作，能与优秀的机械师共事并分享自己对汽车的知识；他目前正在进行一个很酷的项目，尽管有挑战性，并附上一张照片，照片显示一名男子在车库内对汽车发动机进行作业。
[May 03, 2023, 01:16 PM] Dave: Hey Calvin! Long 【Custom Car Project】会话日期：May 03, 2023, 01:16 PM。Calvin 表示：那辆车看起来很棒，你投入了大量努力，看到最终结果很棒，请继续努力，你接下来有什么计划？Dave 表示：感谢 Calvin，感谢你的支持。我将继续学习汽车工程，也许有一天从零开始打造一辆定制车——那就是梦想！现在将继续推进本项目并为客户提供帮助。Calvin 表示：Dave，你真的很鼓舞人心，为实现梦想而努力——这是好事。定制汽车听起来很棒，也别忘了放松并享受这个过程。

9.mflow_response: A Ford Mustang found in junkyard.

memories.memory: 【Calvin's Album Release】On September 13, 2023 at 10:56 AM, Calvin told Dave that his album finally dropped on the 11th and that it was a wild feeling, and that everyone’s been loving it and it’s motivated him to keep going. Dave congratulated Calvin on the album release and asked whether it has been overwhelming or inspiring. Calvin replied that it’s been a lot, that seeing everyone get behind it has been awesome, that it’s kinda overwhelming to think so many appreciate it, that it’s also cool that it’s connecting with people, and that it really motivates him to make even better music. Dave said that it’s awesome when your work gets noticed and makes a positive difference and that it must be really motivating for you to keep chasing your dreams. Calvin concluded that moments like this remind him why he got into music—making a difference and sharing his own story—it's exciting to get positive feedback and it gives him strength to keep going and reach more people, and that his journey’s just getting started. 【Calvin's Tour & Visit】Calvin's Tour & Visit. Session Date: September 13, 2023. At 10:56 AM, Dave acknowledged Calvin's progress since they began talking about music and asked what's next. Calvin replied that a tour is next and afterward he will explore and grow his brand. Dave congratulated Calvin on the upcoming tour and asked if any cities or venues were in mind. Calvin said they are hitting some awesome spots and it will be epic. Dave remarked that live music is the best and that Calvin would have a blast on tour and make memories; he offered to show Calvin his garage to see some cool cars and encouraged him to keep rockin'. Calvin accepted the invitation to visit and said it would be fun to check out the garage and perhaps gain ideas for future projects; he would let Dave know when he's in Boston and urged Dave to keep pursuing his passions and keep those cars rolling. Dave shared an image of his garage: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign. Calvin thanked Dave and expressed anticipation for the visit, saying he would take care and continue enjoying his hobbies. Dave thanked Calvin, appreciated the kind words and support, and said he can't wait for the visit, plus to take care and keep creating amazing music; check out pic of my garage, it looks stunning. [Image shared by Dave: a photo of a car in a garage with a coca cola sign] Calvin replied that he can't wait for the visit either, and told Dave to take care and keep enjoying his hobbies. Dave replied, Sure thing; thanks again for your help; bye; have a great day. Calvin responded, No problem; always good chatting with you; have an awesome day. Dave concluded, Thanks, Calvin! Catch you later. Have a great day.

【Calvin's Tour End】On August 31, 2023 at 02:55 PM, Dave asked Calvin about the end of his tour, saying he bet it was amazing, and shared an image: a photo of a crowd of people at a concert with their hands in the air. Calvin replied that the tour was amazing, he was pumped from the energy of the audience, and the picture totally captures how he felt, such an amazing time, and shared an image: a photo of a crowd of people watching a concert with a large screen. 【Calvin on the Big Stage】Session Date: August 31, 2023. Calvin replied that performing on such a big stage was a dream come true; the energy was incredible and he felt on top of the world; it was surreal. Dave responded that it must have been an incredible experience and congratulated him on achieving such an awesome moment.

【Calvin's Music Journey】Session Date: July 21, 2023. At 06:38 PM, Calvin stated he is transforming a Japanese mansion into a recording studio, a space for creating music with other artists and a sanctuary that reminds him why he loves music, and he shared an image described as a photo of a room with a ladder and a ladder in it. Dave complimented the progress and asked what kind of music Calvin has been creating there. 9.question: Why did Dave start working on cars?

memories.memory:
【Dave's car passion】Session Date: October 23, 2023. At 02:17 PM, Dave said: Cars give me an outlet to express myself, an oasis of calm; when I'm working on one, I'm connecting back with myself, and the music helps too; look at my garage, a little dirty, but everything is in its place. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a garage with a bunch of tools hanging on the wall. Calvin: Looking cool - what made you start working on cars? Dave: Ever since I was ten, I've been fascinated with how machines work; I found an old car in a neighbor's garage and asked if I could fix it; that's when my love for car engineering began; I enjoyed transforming it from broken-down to high-running, and that sense of accomplishment made me hooked—so I've been working on cars ever since. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a man working on a car in a garage. 【Car restoration journey】Session Date: October 23, 2023.

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Calvin: Restoring that car must have required a lot of skill and determination; was it a classic car, and do you still have it or are you currently working on another project?

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Dave: It was a fun project; I restored a car last year, but sold it to a collector; now I'm working on something new, and it's quite a challenge; I shared an image of a black car parked in a parking lot.

At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that paying attention to those small details makes a difference; without them, it's just average; as an artist, he wants to create something extraordinary. At 01:16 PM, Dave added that when he's having trouble coming up with ideas, he usually immerses himself in something he loves, like concerts or his favorite albums, which usually helps to jumpstart his inspiration; he suggested taking a break from music and exploring other things, and to have some fun. At 01:16 PM, Calvin stated that taking a break is great for getting his mojo back; he'll definitely take Dave's advice and explore; he appreciates the help. 【Japan & Nature】Session Date: May 03, 2023. Won't give up. Let's stay in touch." Dave replied, "Keep in touch. If you ever need help, just let me know."

【Calvin's Music Journey】Session Date: July 21, 2023. At 06:38 PM, Calvin stated he is transforming a Japanese mansion into a recording studio, a space for creating music with other artists and a sanctuary that reminds him why he loves music, and he shared an image described as a photo of a room with a ladder and a ladder in it. Dave complimented the progress and asked what kind of music Calvin has been creating there. Calvin said he has been experimenting with different genres, pushing himself out of his comfort zone, and adding electronic elements to his songs to give them a fresh vibe, describing it as an exciting process of self-discovery and growth. Dave asked whether moving between styles presents any challenges. Calvin replied that switching it up can be tough, but it is a matter of finding the right balance between sticking to his sound and trying new stuff; it can be intimidating, but that makes it exciting and keeps him motivated to continue. He added that he started making music to follow his dreams and is stoked about how far he has come; collaborating with others and learning from them keeps him motivated, and surrounding himself with positive energy and passion helps as well. Dave noted that surrounding oneself with good vibes and collaborating will give a boost and acknowledged the progress achieved so far. Calvin acknowledged the support and stated he would keep pushing himself toward his goals. Dave offered continued encouragement, and Calvin agreed to catch up soon. 【Calvin and the Press】Calvin and the Press; Session Date: July 21, 2023. On July 21, 2023, at 06:38 PM, Dave said: "Yeah, I get it. Finding a balance is tricky but it's gotta keep things interesting. How are you dealing with the pressure and staying motivated?"

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Dave: It was a fun project; I restored a car last year, but sold it to a collector; now I'm working on something new, and it's quite a challenge; I shared an image of a black car parked in a parking lot.

Calvin responded, "Way to go, Dave! Congrats on opening your own car shop! Your excitement is contagious. Keep up the great work!" Dave then replied, "Thanks, Calvin! Your support is greatly appreciated. It's been quite a journey so far, and I'm excited to see what the future holds. How about you? Anything exciting happening in the world of music for you?"

Dave complimented the progress and asked what kind of music Calvin has been creating there. Calvin said he has been experimenting with different genres, pushing himself out of his comfort zone, and adding electronic elements to his songs to give them a fresh vibe, describing it as an exciting process of self-discovery and growth. Dave asked whether moving between styles presents any challenges. Calvin replied that switching it up can be tough, but it is a matter of finding the right balance between sticking to his sound and trying new stuff; it can be intimidating, but that makes it exciting and keeps him motivated to continue. He added that he started making music to follow his dreams and is stoked about how far he has come; collaborating with others and learning from them keeps him motivated, and surrounding himself with positive energy and passion helps as well. Dave noted that surrounding oneself with good vibes and collaborating will give a boost and acknowledged the progress achieved so far. Calvin acknowledged the support and stated he would keep pushing himself toward his goals. Dave offered continued encouragement, and Calvin agreed to catch up soon. 【Calvin and the Press】Calvin and the Press; Session Date: July 21, 2023. On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Dave praised Calvin’s setup, encouraged him to keep up the great work, and said to take a look at the photo; an image was shared described as a photo of a notebook with a pen and a notepad on it. 【TVViewing】TVViewing. Plus, it's a source of inspiration for me." 【CreativeProcess】Session Date: November 02, 2023. At 05:46 PM, Calvin asked Dave whether this notebook helps stay connected to the creative process. Calvin stated: These really help you stay focused when making music.

An image shared by Dave shows a city skyline with a river and boats in the water.

【Dave's Blog Impact】在 November 02, 2023, 05:46 PM，Dave 表示他最近开设了一个关于改装汽车的博客，以与他人分享他的热情，并请求 Calvin 给出博客方面的建议；他还附上一张照片，描述为 "a photography of a car website design"。 Calvin 回应说通过博客分享激情很有趣，并询问是否已经有激励他人的成功案例。 Dave 回应说人们在关注他的博客并向他寻求建议；他最近发了一篇关于让这辆车看起来像野兽的文章，听到它启发他人开始自己的 DIY 项目很棒；图片描述为 "a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot"。 Calvin 夸赞 Dave 的博客很棒，帮助他人发挥创造力，并鼓励继续努力。 Dave 表示感谢他的支持，认为分享知识、帮助他人释放创造力令人感到充实。 Calvin 结束时鼓励 Dave 继续做下去，称他的博客和汽车改装具有启发性，是帮助人们找到创造力的好方式。 【Car Mods】Car Mods
Session Date: November 02, 2023. On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Dave said the car mod was a lot of work but was worth it in the end. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot.

[Session Date: August 11, 2023]

Dave replied that he has been working on the car, performing engine swaps and suspension modifications, and is now learning about body modifications; giving this classic muscle car a modern twist is a challenge but fun. An image shared by Dave shows a silver corvette parked in front of a building. Calvin commented that it looks cool and that the silver finish gives it a modern twist. Dave said he wanted a modern vibe but also that classic muscle car style and that he is really happy with it. Calvin acknowledged the work and attention to detail. Dave said the small details make it unique and personalized. Calvin said that customizing a masterpiece with those small details is what makes it unique and personalized. Dave stated that it's about showing his style, like customizing a work of art on wheels. 【Calvin's Music Commitments】Session Date: August 11, 2023. At 05:22 PM Calvin encouraged Dave, noting his enthusiasm and hard work in everything he does and urging him to keep coming up with new cool stuff, expressing excitement to see what Dave will do next. At 05:22 PM Dave replied that he appreciates Calvin's help, will keep working hard and coming up with new cool stuff, offered to help with Calvin's music, and shared his music studio setup with a high-quality sound system; an image shared by Dave shows a desk with a keyboard, monitor, and keyboard pad. At 05:22 PM Calvin said he is super busy with his music at the moment and will keep it in mind. At 05:22 PM Dave said No worries, got it, good luck with your music. At 05:22 PM Calvin said thanks for the encouragement; he'll keep working hard and making music.

【Dave's Car Maintenance Shop Launch】May 01, 2023, 06:24 PM，Dave宣布自己开设了自营汽车维护店，并分享了一张图片，内容为一间汽车经销商，前方停放着多辆汽车。Calvin对开业表示祝贺，认为Dave的努力和奉献已得到回报，并附上另一张照片，显示一名男子在车库里检查车辆。Dave感谢Calvin的支持，称开设这家店是他的梦想，尽管付出了大量努力，但看到店铺开始运作，还是值得。他表示这也是他实现另一个梦想的步骤，即从事经典汽车工作，热爱它们的设计与工程。Calvin称赞Dave在经典车领域的勇气和野心，认为追求经典车很酷，强调实现梦想的重要性。Dave说自己痴迷于经典车，去年曾修复过一辆，觉得让它重获新生没有比这更棒的事；并附上被修复汽车发动机的照片，照片中发动机带有一个小型空气滤清器。Calvin回应照片很棒；Dave表示这是一项充满爱意的劳动，虽有挑战但非常值得。两人讨论到看到自己创作的东西“活起来”的成就感，以及把努力变成现实所带来的满足，彼此认为这是奉献与热情的最佳融合，并鼓励继续努力。Dave表示会继续努力，并提到这是一张自己店面的照片，若有时间请对方来参观，最后附上一张一群人站在一辆车前的照片。 【Dave's Car Services & Rewards】Session Date: May 01, 2023. At 06:24 PM, Calvin asked what sort of cars the shop works on. Dave replied that he works on all kinds of cars at the shop—from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars—and that it keeps him busy and happy. Calvin stated that working on cars must be really rewarding. Dave said he is passionate about working on cars, that doing it every day is rewarding, that seeing the transformation is awesome, and that helping people keep their cars in good condition is satisfying. Calvin noted that doing something you love and helping others is rewarding. Dave expressed appreciation for the encouragement, saying it means a lot that his work is valued and that it brings joy to others.

【Dave's car passion】Session Date: October 23, 2023. At 02:17 PM, Dave said: Cars give me an outlet to express myself, an oasis of calm; when I'm working on one, I'm connecting back with myself, and the music helps too; look at my garage, a little dirty, but everything is in its place. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a garage with a bunch of tools hanging on the wall. Calvin: Looking cool - what made you start working on cars? Dave: Ever since I was ten, I've been fascinated with how machines work; I found an old car in a neighbor's garage and asked if I could fix it; that's when my love for car engineering began; I enjoyed transforming it from broken-down to high-running, and that sense of accomplishment made me hooked—so I've been working on cars ever since. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a man working on a car in a garage. 【Car restoration journey】Session Date: October 23, 2023.

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Calvin: Restoring that car must have required a lot of skill and determination; was it a classic car, and do you still have it or are you currently working on another project?

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Dave: It was a fun project; I restored a car last year, but sold it to a collector; now I'm working on something new, and it's quite a challenge; I shared an image of a black car parked in a parking lot.

October 23, 2023, 02:17 PM Calvin: Cool; I have been wanting to try car restoration, and what is the toughest part of car restoration? 【Attention to detail in craft】On October 23, 2023, at 02:17 PM, Dave stated that paying attention to detail takes a lot of patience, but the payoff is worth it, and that paying extra attention to detail isn't easy, but it pays off. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that details can really make a difference and are what makes something great, such as a well-crafted rap song or a sleek and stylish car. At 02:17 PM, Dave stated that paying attention to details makes a big difference, whether in music or with vehicles, and that little things can make a big impact. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that paying attention to those small details makes a difference; without them, it's just average; as an artist, he wants to create something extraordinary. Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a silver disc in a black frame on a table. At 02:17 PM, Dave stated that that's great, Calvin, and that the attention to detail in your work makes it extra special; keep on creating. Image shared by Dave: a photo of a brown amp with a black knob and a brown cover. At 02:17 PM, Calvin stated thanks, appreciating your support.

【Dave's Car Shop Opening】On May 16, 2023, at 11:50 AM, Dave stated that he opened his car shop last week, invited some friends over to celebrate, and that it has been amazing and incredible so far; he is excited to share his passion and help out with folks' rides. Calvin responded, "Way to go, Dave! Congrats on opening your own car shop! Your excitement is contagious. Keep up the great work!" Dave then replied, "Thanks, Calvin! Your support is greatly appreciated. It's been quite a journey so far, and I'm excited to see what the future holds. How about you? Anything exciting happening in the world of music for you?"

【Calvin's Fan Experience】May 31, 2023, 06:06 PM Dave: 邻居的车发动机有故障，现已由我自己修复；图片由 Dave 分享，显示车库里一名男子正在修理汽车发动机。

May 31, 2023, 06:06 PM Calvin: 这是一次难忘的经历——来自粉丝的能量和爱让人感到疯狂。图片里的车是你为朋友修发动机的那辆吗？修车帮助我放松、清理头脑。 【Dave on Fixing & Transformation】May 31, 2023, 06:06 PM: Dave stated that helping his neighbors with their cars is not difficult and that fixing cars is therapeutic, and he asked Calvin whether it relaxes him as much as it does Dave. Calvin replied that fixing cars calms him and provides a real sense of achievement akin to meditation, and asked Dave if he has hobbies that provide the same satisfaction. Dave added that he is passionate about fixing up things; it is more than a hobby, giving him achievement and purpose, and he gets a buzz from transforming something not working into something that runs smoothly, like giving it a second chance. Calvin found it inspiring that Dave finds purpose in transforming things, including creating something new or collaborating with others, and stated that they are making something great out of nothing. Dave stated that taking something and making it look amazing gives it a new life, making him feel powerful and happy, like he achieved something. Calvin concluded that the feeling of power and happiness is amazing and it's great to see what they created with their hard work and ideas.

【Old Friend in Boston】On November 13, 2023, at 09:15 PM, Calvin invited his old high school buddy to see him perform in Boston; he described it as insane, noted it reminded him how far he has come and how important relationships are in this biz, and he felt good. Dave responded that it's great and that seeing his old friend must have brought back memories, and that it's awesome to have someone who's been there since the start to support us. Calvin recalled nostalgia from freestyling and discussing getting famous; life has changed, but being around certain people still sparks those same feelings; take a look at how we freestyled when we were teenagers! [Image shared by Calvin: a photography of two men standing on a sidewalk with a car in the background] Dave: Wow, that's a great pic! Did that person make a big difference during your trip? Calvin: He's been such a great friend to me. Always there to support and encourage me. His positivity has made a big difference in my journey. Dave: It's great how someone's support and encouragement can really shape our lives! They give us the motivation to keep going and trust ourselves. Do you also find having supportive people around you important for your artist development? Calvin: Having supportive people is key for me to grow as an artist. They motivate me to get better and stay true to myself. Having support is vital, especially in this tough music industry. Take a look at this photo! [Image shared by Calvin: a photography of a group of people sitting around a desk] 【Young Musicians Program】[Young Musicians Program] [Session Date: November 13, 2023] 在 November 13, 2023, 09:15 PM，Dave 问 Calvin 这张图片是不是他正在与之合作的音乐人。Calvin 回应他一直在支持来自某音乐项目的年轻音乐人，支持他们的热情令人惊叹，他们的热情也很鼓舞人心。Dave 表示 Calvin 通过支持下一代音乐人并帮助他们成长，确实在发挥作用并让音乐得以持续。Calvin 说这像把火炬传递下去以让音乐保持生命力，这些年轻音乐人非常有雄心，他计划长期支持他们。Dave 表示 Calvin 的支持让音乐得以延续并传承。Calvin 表示他很开心自己有所作为，愿意将善举传递下去，与新人才一起工作会带来新的想法。他还说：Look at this photo, here's how I'm making a beat for a young artist, he has great potential in music! [Calvin 分享的图片：一名男子坐在桌子前，桌前有一台电脑] 【Music Studio Experiments】Session Date: November 13, 2023. At 09:15 PM, Dave noted that the music studio looks great and asked whether Calvin had tried any new ideas lately. Calvin replied that he is having fun trying out new sounds and pushing the boundaries, that going for new ideas and seeing where it takes him is great, and that he must stay ahead. Dave stated that experimenting and pushing boundaries are key to making their art grow and that he can't wait to see where these new ideas take Calvin. Calvin said it's exciting to see where these new ideas lead and that growing and evolving is the focus. Dave asserted that growing and evolving are key for any artist, urged not to stop pushing oneself and to keep exploring, and that he can't wait to see what Calvin comes up with next.

【Ratatouille】Ratatouille. Session Date: September 15, 2023. September 15, 2023, 12:13 AM: Calvin states that Ratatouille is one of his favorites and that it is about going after what you love, no matter what anyone says; he adds that in the previous conversation you mentioned your car hobby—how's that going? 【Vintage car restoration】Session Date: September 15, 2023. At 12:13 AM, Dave shared the final result photo from restoring a vintage car, described as an image of a man standing next to a classic car. Calvin commented that the work looks amazing and asked if it is satisfying to see hard work pay off. Dave replied that it is very satisfying to see the car brought back to life, especially with people's reactions when they see the finished product, which makes all the hard work worth it. Calvin said that it is awesome seeing people happy thanks to Dave, that fixing cars is an art, and that Dave is inspiring, urging him to keep up the good work. Dave expressed appreciation for Calvin's recognition, said he is glad he can make people happy and will continue doing so, and added that he has a lot of work to do. Calvin concluded by saying Dave is talented, that he should keep making people happy and doing what he loves, and that this is what it's all about.

【Car Restoration】October 04, 2023, 02:44 PM: Dave said the Ford Mustang found in a junkyard was in bad shape but had potential, and that working on cars relaxes him. Calvin asked for pictures of the finished result. Dave provided a photo, stated that he put in a lot of work restoring it, the result is awesome, and that it is satisfying to bring an old car back to life; Image shared by Dave: a photography of a red car parked in a field with other cars. Calvin said they have been greatly privileged to have been granted this opportunity and that it’s satisfying to bring it back to life; Image shared by Calvin: a photo of a person's hand with dirty hands next to a car. Dave stated that it is very satisfying, noting that his hands after a day in the garage are permanently stained with grease, but it’s worth it when you see the end result; Image shared by Dave: a photography of a person's hands with dirt on them. 【Pride and Small Wins】Session Date: October 04, 2023. At 02:44 PM on October 04, 2023, Calvin observed that Dave's hands showed he worked hard, that he put in lots of effort, and that Dave should definitely be proud. Dave thanked Calvin, saying he loves being able to transform something old and beat-up into something beautiful, and that the small successes make him feel proud and fulfilled. Calvin added that those little wins matter, give us a sense of accomplishment and joy, and that it is truly inspiring to see how much we can grow. 【Progress and Motivation】On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Dave told Calvin: "Sure, Calvin! It's awesome seeing the progress and development, both in our projects and ourselves. Hard work really does pay off!" On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Calvin replied: "Yeah, hard work and dedication are definitely key to reaching our goals and potential. It's awesome to see our growth and progress." On October 04, 2023 at 02:44 PM, Dave said: "Yeah, it's great to see our progress. It's really motivating and keeps me pushing for more."

【Dave's Blog Impact】在 November 02, 2023, 05:46 PM，Dave 表示他最近开设了一个关于改装汽车的博客，以与他人分享他的热情，并请求 Calvin 给出博客方面的建议；他还附上一张照片，描述为 "a photography of a car website design"。 Calvin 回应说通过博客分享激情很有趣，并询问是否已经有激励他人的成功案例。 Dave 回应说人们在关注他的博客并向他寻求建议；他最近发了一篇关于让这辆车看起来像野兽的文章，听到它启发他人开始自己的 DIY 项目很棒；图片描述为 "a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot"。 Calvin 夸赞 Dave 的博客很棒，帮助他人发挥创造力，并鼓励继续努力。 Dave 表示感谢他的支持，认为分享知识、帮助他人释放创造力令人感到充实。 Calvin 结束时鼓励 Dave 继续做下去，称他的博客和汽车改装具有启发性，是帮助人们找到创造力的好方式。 【Car Mods】Car Mods
Session Date: November 02, 2023. On November 02, 2023, at 05:46 PM, Dave said the car mod was a lot of work but was worth it in the end. Image shared by Dave: a photography of a blue subarunt parked in a parking lot.

【Aerosmith Live】March 26, 2023, 04:45 PM: Dave reported that last weekend he attended a music festival in Boston; it was awesome, with many bands and an electric atmosphere; he loves music, which reminded him why he loves it; he shared an image showing a large crowd at the concert. Calvin asked which performer was his favorite. Dave replied that Aerosmith would be his favorite; their performance was incredible; he shared an image from the concert with a large eagle on the stage. Calvin said, Cool! Lovin' Aerosmith. Dave added that he finally saw Aerosmith live and it was an amazing experience; he was jamming out to one of their hits; he shared an epic image of two people on stage with guitars and a microphone. Calvin asked if he had a chance to hang out with them after the show. Dave answered that he did not hang out after the show, but seeing them live was cool enough; it's always a dream to see your favorites performing. Calvin concluded that it's always a dream to see your favorites doing their thing and expressed that he was glad Dave got to experience that. 【Dave's Life】Session: Dave's Life; Session Date: March 26, 2023. At 04:45 PM on March 26, 2023, Dave stated that it was an incredible experience and asked, 'So, anything new happening in your life?'

【Calvin's Music Journey】Session Date: July 21, 2023. At 06:38 PM, Calvin stated he is transforming a Japanese mansion into a recording studio, a space for creating music with other artists and a sanctuary that reminds him why he loves music, and he shared an image described as a photo of a room with a ladder and a ladder in it. Dave complimented the progress and asked what kind of music Calvin has been creating there. Calvin said he has been experimenting with different genres, pushing himself out of his comfort zone, and adding electronic elements to his songs to give them a fresh vibe, describing it as an exciting process of self-discovery and growth. Dave asked whether moving between styles presents any challenges. Calvin replied that switching it up can be tough, but it is a matter of finding the right balance between sticking to his sound and trying new stuff; it can be intimidating, but that makes it exciting and keeps him motivated to continue. He added that he started making music to follow his dreams and is stoked about how far he has come; collaborating with others and learning from them keeps him motivated, and surrounding himself with positive energy and passion helps as well. Dave noted that surrounding oneself with good vibes and collaborating will give a boost and acknowledged the progress achieved so far. Calvin acknowledged the support and stated he would keep pushing himself toward his goals. Dave offered continued encouragement, and Calvin agreed to catch up soon. 【Calvin and the Press】Calvin and the Press; Session Date: July 21, 2023. On July 21, 2023, at 06:38 PM, Dave said: "Yeah, I get it. Finding a balance is tricky but it's gotta keep things interesting. How are you dealing with the pressure and staying motivated?"

【Dave-Calvin Hobbies】[Dave-Calvin Hobbies] [Session Date: May 03, 2023] At 01:16 PM, Dave asked Calvin whether he has any hobbies that help him relax. Calvin replied that long drives in [this car] really help him relax; the wind and the open road feel freeing and help clear his head; he asked Dave what he likes to do to chill out; an image shared by Calvin shows a photo of a red sports car driving down a road. At 01:16 PM, Dave said that driving with the wind in your hair is calming and that taking a walk around is a great way to destress; exploring, taking in the sights and sounds, is a peaceful experience. At 01:16 PM, Dave added that when he's having trouble coming up with ideas, he usually immerses himself in something he loves, like concerts or his favorite albums, which usually helps to jumpstart his inspiration; he suggested taking a break from music and exploring other things, and to have some fun. At 01:16 PM, Calvin stated that taking a break is great for getting his mojo back; he'll definitely take Dave's advice and explore; he appreciates the help. 【Japan & Nature】Session Date: May 03, 2023. Won't give up. Let's stay in touch." Dave replied, "Keep in touch. If you ever need help, just let me know."

【Dave's Rock Band】June 21, 2023, 03:15 PM: Dave says he recently joined a rock band and has been practicing guitar and shares a photo – it's us, the guys! Dave says that good company and great music lift the mood and bring a lot of positive emotions; he has to go now and will see you soon. Calvin replies, Thanks, Dave! let's keep in touch, take care!

【Dave's Car Maintenance Shop Launch】May 01, 2023, 06:24 PM，Dave宣布自己开设了自营汽车维护店，并分享了一张图片，内容为一间汽车经销商，前方停放着多辆汽车。Calvin对开业表示祝贺，认为Dave的努力和奉献已得到回报，并附上另一张照片，显示一名男子在车库里检查车辆。Dave感谢Calvin的支持，称开设这家店是他的梦想，尽管付出了大量努力，但看到店铺开始运作，还是值得。他表示这也是他实现另一个梦想的步骤，即从事经典汽车工作，热爱它们的设计与工程。Calvin称赞Dave在经典车领域的勇气和野心，认为追求经典车很酷，强调实现梦想的重要性。Dave说自己痴迷于经典车，去年曾修复过一辆，觉得让它重获新生没有比这更棒的事；并附上被修复汽车发动机的照片，照片中发动机带有一个小型空气滤清器。Calvin回应照片很棒；Dave表示这是一项充满爱意的劳动，虽有挑战但非常值得。两人讨论到看到自己创作的东西“活起来”的成就感，以及把努力变成现实所带来的满足，彼此认为这是奉献与热情的最佳融合，并鼓励继续努力。Dave表示会继续努力，并提到这是一张自己店面的照片，若有时间请对方来参观，最后附上一张一群人站在一辆车前的照片。 【Dave's Car Services & Rewards】Session Date: May 01, 2023. At 06:24 PM, Calvin asked what sort of cars the shop works on. Dave replied that he works on all kinds of cars at the shop—from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars—and that it keeps him busy and happy. Calvin stated that working on cars must be really rewarding. Dave said he is passionate about working on cars, that doing it every day is rewarding, that seeing the transformation is awesome, and that helping people keep their cars in good condition is satisfying. Calvin noted that doing something you love and helping others is rewarding. Dave expressed appreciation for the encouragement, saying it means a lot that his work is valued and that it brings joy to others.

Dave replied that this is a dream come true for him, as he has always wanted to learn auto engineering and build a custom car. Calvin responded that pursuing auto engineering and making a custom car is a great experience, and asked what he thinks is the most thrilling part. [Session Date: August 11, 2023]

At 05:22 PM Calvin said he is super busy with his music at the moment and will keep it in mind. At 05:22 PM Dave said No worries, got it, good luck with your music. [May 03, 2023, 01:16 PM] Dave: Hey Calvin! Long 【Custom Car Project】会话日期：May 03, 2023, 01:16 PM。Calvin 表示：那辆车看起来很棒，你投入了大量努力，看到最终结果很棒，请继续努力，你接下来有什么计划？Dave 表示：感谢 Calvin，感谢你的支持。我将继续学习汽车工程，也许有一天从零开始打造一辆定制车——那就是梦想！现在将继续推进本项目并为客户提供帮助。Calvin 表示：Dave，你真的很鼓舞人心，为实现梦想而努力——这是好事。定制汽车听起来很棒，也别忘了放松并享受这个过程。

memories.memory: 【Old Friend in Boston】On November 13, 2023, at 09:15 PM, Calvin invited his old high school buddy to see him perform in Boston; he described it as insane, noted it reminded him how far he has come and how important relationships are in this biz, and he felt good. Dave responded that it's great and that seeing his old friend must have brought back memories, and that it's awesome to have someone who's been there since the start to support us. Calvin recalled nostalgia from freestyling and discussing getting famous; life has changed, but being around certain people still sparks those same feelings; take a look at how we freestyled when we were teenagers! [Image shared by Calvin: a photography of two men standing on a sidewalk with a car in the background] Dave: Wow, that's a great pic! Did that person make a big difference during your trip? Calvin: He's been such a great friend to me. Always there to support and encourage me. His positivity has made a big difference in my journey. Dave: It's great how someone's support and encouragement can really shape our lives! They give us the motivation to keep going and trust ourselves. Do you also find having supportive people around you important for your artist development? Calvin: Having supportive people is key for me to grow as an artist. They motivate me to get better and stay true to myself. Having support is vital, especially in this tough music industry. Take a look at this photo! [Image shared by Calvin: a photography of a group of people sitting around a desk] 【Young Musicians Program】[Young Musicians Program] [Session Date: November 13, 2023] 在 November 13, 2023, 09:15 PM，Dave 问 Calvin 这张图片是不是他正在与之合作的音乐人。Calvin 回应他一直在支持来自某音乐项目的年轻音乐人，支持他们的热情令人惊叹，他们的热情也很鼓舞人心。Dave 表示 Calvin 通过支持下一代音乐人并帮助他们成长，确实在发挥作用并让音乐得以持续。Calvin 说这像把火炬传递下去以让音乐保持生命力，这些年轻音乐人非常有雄心，他计划长期支持他们。Dave 表示 Calvin 的支持让音乐得以延续并传承。Calvin 表示他很开心自己有所作为，愿意将善举传递下去，与新人才一起工作会带来新的想法。他还说：Look at this photo, here's how I'm making a beat for a young artist, he has great potential in music! [Calvin 分享的图片：一名男子坐在桌子前，桌前有一台电脑] 【Music Studio Experiments】Session Date: November 13, 2023. At 09:15 PM, Dave noted that the music studio looks great and asked whether Calvin had tried any new ideas lately. Calvin replied that he is having fun trying out new sounds and pushing the boundaries, that going for new ideas and seeing where it takes him is great, and that he must stay ahead. Calvin said it's exciting to see where these new ideas lead and that growing and evolving is the focus. 【Dave & Calvin: Concert Memories】On October 23, 2023, at 02:17 PM, Dave said the photo reminded him of the good times he had at concerts last month, that music connects people and creates memories, and that the atmosphere was amazing; he shared a photo of a crowd at a concert with their hands in the air. Also at 02:17 PM, Calvin said music brings people together and creates unforgettable memories and is unbeatable in terms of energy; he shared a photo of a crowd at a concert with their hands in the air. At 02:17 PM, Dave said concerts are awesome, they bring people together and create a cool vibe, and you can feel the energy in the air; he shared a photo of a crowd standing around a stage, and this was an unforgettable moment captured at the concert. 【Dave & Calvin: Crowd Connection】On October 23, 2023, at 02:17 PM, Calvin stated that concerts are what he lives for and that the indescribable connection between the artist and the crowd is amazing. Calvin added that it's a rush connecting with everyone and that the feeling is unbeatable. 【Boston Tour】On May 31, 2023, at 06:06 PM, Calvin expressed excitement for the tour with Frank and eagerness to perform in Boston, and asked Dave for his view of the Boston music scene. 【Calvin News】On November 17, 2023 at 10:54 AM, Calvin announced that he had accepted an invitation to perform at an upcoming show in Boston, describing it as an unforgettable musical experience and saying he would fill in the details and catch up soon. Stay safe, talk to you soon!"; Calvin said: "Thanks! You too. Talk to you later!"

【Calvin & Dave Summer Drive】Session Date: September 22, 2023. Calvin responded, "Way to go, Dave! Congrats on opening your own car shop! Your excitement is contagious. Keep up the great work!" Dave then replied, "Thanks, Calvin! Dave congratulated him and asked how it's driving. Calvin described the car as an amazing ride—super smooth and real powerful, like a rockstar behind the wheel—and thanked Dave. Dave asked if this is his first car, to see a pic, and what's it called. Calvin posted a picture from yesterday when he took it for a ride, saying, “Woohoo! I finally got myself this beauty.
